programme.title: Hank Zipzer
programme.desc: Miss Adolf turns Mr Rock's Rudolph the Rock 'n' Roll Reindeer into a one-woman Christmas Carol. Two school inspectors are injured in a bizarre sleighing accident and Mr Joy is tries to cancel Christmas altogether. In addition, the youngster has to prepare for the arrival of a new baby brother. Comedy drama based on the books by Henry Winkler, featuring a dyslexic 12-year-old boy who always has an original solution to life's problems

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Skipper, Kowalski, Private and Rico embark on an adventure on Christmas Eve. Animated film spin-off of the popular films, featuring the voices of John DiMaggio and Tom McGrath

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: Proteus, leader of the mysterious Guardians, traps the Aronnax in a magnetic field and kidnaps Ant, believing he is the key to finding Lemuria

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: Monster Hunter thinks he's hunting a siren - a mythical creature whose song lures sailors to their doom. The Nektons discover it's actually a rare whale with a unique voice, and race to save it from destruction

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: Fontaine believes a fish is responsible for wrecking Dolos's boat, sinking the Aronnax, and almost destroying the Rover, so she tries to get rid of it and its bad luck

programme.title: Almost Never
programme.desc: Nate's shock after his Dad's surprise visit force Chloe and The Wonderland into a panic.

programme.title: Gym Stars
programme.desc: Amelie and Phoebe are competing at the European Championships with the junior Team GB.

programme.title: Katy
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old Katy keeps getting in trouble everywhere, especially with her stepmum Izzie. After Katy suffers a serious injury, will her life ever be the same again?

programme.title: Little Big Awesome
programme.desc: When the puppies don't show up, Gluko and Lennon join expert Penelop Pitt-Plebop to find the legendary puppies.

programme.title: Diddy TV
programme.desc: Coronation Street's Colson Smith is held hostage in Diddy Chat

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: Convinced that Mrs Creecher is secretly a master of Blamjitsu, JJ persuades the gang to help her trick Mrs Creecher into revealing her blam credentials

programme.title: She-Ra
programme.desc: The Best Friend Squad and Sea Hawk investigate the Horde's presence

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: The kids' mean neighbor, Wanda, has started enforcing a dogs-on-leashes law. Boy, Girl, Cheese and Mouse each come up with ideas about how to show that Dog is special and doesn’t need a leash.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The Odd Squad tube system has mysteriously been shut down.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The Mobile Unit reports to the New York City Odd Squad to help with a big problem.

programme.desc: Piper learns what life would be like if she never joined The Next Step

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Piper struggles to reignite the love of dance in everyone

programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old Jamie embarks on the biggest adventure of his life when his dad invites him to go on an Arctic trek. However, his sulky attitude threatens to put it in danger

programme.title: Dragons: Riders of Berk
programme.desc: Alvin and the outcast Vikings terrorise Berk, which has been left defenceless without its dragons. Hiccup is the only one who can bring them back

programme.title: Scream Street
programme.desc: Luke tries to save the town from the Grumpus and restore a Merry Christmas

programme.title: Horrible Histories

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur, Buster and Brain are worried when Mr Ratburn isn't acting like himself. He's always pleased to see them, so what has made him change his tune?

programme.desc: Bitzer has his heart set on an ice-cream - but there are several chores to do first

programme.title: The Dumping Ground
programme.desc: Jody retreats into a fictional wonderland when faced with a momentous dilemma. Feature-length drama based on books by Jacqueline Wilson, starring Connor Byrne, Kay Purcell and Kia Pegg

programme.title: Max and Harvey: FOMO
programme.desc: Max and Harvey bring you up to speed with all things CBBC and more! Packed full of vlogs and funny challenges

programme.title: Crackerjack!
programme.desc: Sam and Mark host a bumper edition of festive fun! Naga Munchetty and Charlie Stayt play an extra-messy game of Splatterjack and there is music from Becky Hill.

programme.title: Book of Dragons (2011)
programme.desc: Animated short based on the 2010 fantasy film How to Train Your Dragon. Hiccup, Astrid, Fishlegs, Toothless and Gobber uncover the legend behind the Book of Dragons and reveal insider training secrets regarding some new, never-before-seen mythical creatures. With the voices of Jay Baruchel and Craig Ferguson

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: The Rover is swallowed by a supposedly extinct creature, and as Will and Fontaine cling on just inside its mouth, Kaiko and Ant face a desperate race against time to free them

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: The Nektons are trying to identify a unique life form. They've never seen it and have only heard its sound - bloop. Just as Ant discovers its true nature, a huge underwater mining machine threatens to destroy it

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: A weird glowing fish lures every fish in the area to its bioluminescence. When Kaiko and Will also fall under its spell, Ant and Fontaine must rescue their parents-while wearing blindfolds against the hypnotic glow

programme.title: Hetty Feather

programme.desc: It's Frosty Frolics Day, and Love Monster plans to spend it with Bad Idea Puppy and his cousin Good Idea Puppy, who has come to visit. Love Monster thinks that since Good Idea Puppy is the guest, she should choose which activity they do first. She decides that they should start with the ice slide. Love Monster and Good Idea Puppy go together and have a great time, but Bad Idea Puppy has to go on his own and struggles to slide down. After the slide, they visit the Frosty Frolics Fayre, and Good Idea Puppy and Love Monster accidentally choose activities made for two all day long. Finally, just as Love Monster and Good Idea Puppy are about to go on a tandem ski through the forest, Bad Idea Puppy asks if this time he can go with his cousin so he won't be the odd puppy out. Love Monster happily agrees, but soon he realises that frosty frolics aren't fun on your own, and that Bad Idea Puppy must have been feeling left out all day.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: On a cold day in Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies find big snowballs, dance with a snowman and watch children make a caterpillar from snow

programme.title: Ferne and Rory's Vet Tales

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: Gem and her teams of Swashbucklers try to win her jewels back from pirates Cook, Line and Sinker. Game show for children

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside in the snow and decide to build a jolly-looking snowman. However, the fun begins when the punky penguins turn up

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: When Cotton-tail is taken ill, Peter must bring Dr Bobtail through the woods, but unfortunately Mr Tod has other ideas for the rabbits, which involve a minty stew

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: Delivery Duckling arrives and tells Love Monster he has been chosen to be sipping host at a special Hot Chocolate Day ceremony. She then cycles off before telling him what a sipping host does. Love Monster goes to Elder Panda to ask his advice, and he tells him there are many ways to serve hot chocolate - each person needs to find their own unique way. Elder Panda adds honey and banana from his garden to his. Love Monster starts the ceremony by adding his signature marshmallows, but then Tiniest Fluffiest Bunny announces she puts marshmallows in hers too. Love Monster thinks he needs to use something more unusual, so he adds pickles, but this doesn’t go down well - in fact, it tastes horrible! It turns out the reason why he was chosen was so that he could make hot chocolate the way he always makes it. He does, and everyone loves it.

programme.title: Catie's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: Preschool series looking at the biggest, fastest and most amazing machines in the world. In this episode, rally driver Catie is at her track to show off three amazing machines that move on snow! She drives a snow mobile, shows us lots of amazing snow blowers and then drives up a mountain in a snow groomer.

programme.title: Magic Hands
programme.desc: Children's programme.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: he Go Jetters are in snowy Norway to learn about the reindeer that are cared for by the local Sami people. In the spring the reindeer go on a very long journey called migration and as part of this journey they catch a ferry to take them to their warmer summer home. Grandmaster Glitch and the Grimbots are also in Norway, but their Grimbler scares the migrating reindeer and some of them run away from the herd. The Go Jetters need to keep them calm and get them back to the herd so they can finish their migration

programme.title: CBeebies Presents Christmas in Storyland
programme.desc: A special festive show featuring the stars of CBeebies, in which a delivery elf must take a stocking full of presents to the empress of Storyland, encountering magical creatures along the way - including a yodeling yeti. Starring , Andy Day, Justin Fletcher and Gemma Hunt

programme.title: Moon and Me
programme.desc: Mr Onion rides out on the Bumparoller to help all of those around him

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: Revival of the classic animation about the adventures of a clan of friendly aliens living on a small blue planet. Michael Palin narrates

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: Makka Pakka's trumpet makes a funny noise, and the Pontipines count to three. Derek Jacobi narrates

programme.title: Hushabye Lullabye
programme.desc: Dillie Dally plays in the winter snow and gets some help building a friendly snow alien.

programme.title: CBeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.desc: A tale is read for younger viewers before they go to bed

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Jon Kay and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Tinker Bell and the Legend of the NeverBeast (2014)
programme.desc: One of Tinker Bell's friends meets a large hairy monster, and discovers he is not as fearsome as he looks. However, she has a hard time convincing the other fairies to accept him, and needs the help of her friends to protect the creature. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Mae Whitman, Ginnifer Goodwin and Rosario Dawson

programme.title: The Muppets (2011)
programme.desc: Three fans of the famous puppet variety show discover a powerful businessman is going to knock down the Muppet theatre and drill for oil on the site. They track down frontman Kermit the frog and persuade him to reunite his co-stars, so they can put on one last performance to save the venue. Comedy, starring Jason Segel, Amy Adams and Chris Cooper, with songs by Bret McKenzie (Flight of the Conchords)

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: The food writer provides everyday cooking advice, demonstrating recipes that are uncomplicated and easy to remember

programme.title: BBC Wales Today Coronavirus Daily Update
programme.desc: The latest developments, including the daily Welsh Government news conference

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales

programme.title: Oz the Great and Powerful (2013)
programme.desc: An amoral circus illusionist is transported to a magical land, where he is mistaken for a powerful wizard prophesied to fall from the sky and save the realm from evil. His attempt to take advantage of the situation leads him into a dangerous quest involving three powerful witches. Fantasy adventure prequel to The Wizard of Oz, starring James Franco, Mila Kunis, Rachel Weisz and Michelle Williams

programme.title: Worzel Gummidge
programme.desc: City children Susan and John are spending their summer at Scatterbrook Farm, where they are amazed to discover the scarecrow of Ten Acre Field can come to life. But it seems this extraordinary new friendship has thrown the rhythm of the natural world out of kilter and now they must work to put things right. Mackenzie Crook writes, directs and stars in the first of two new dramas from 2019 based on the books by Barbara Euphan Todd - last adapted 40 years ago in the popular ITV series with Jon Pertwee. Co-starring Steve Pemberton, Rosie Cavaliero and Vicki Pepperdine

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: A Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Nick Park's Bafta-winning film which introduced the animated inventor and his faithful canine sidekick to the world. Wallace is distraught when his cheese supplies run out, so he decides to take a trip to the moon. All he needs to do is build himself a rocket. With the voice of Peter Sallis

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman host a children's TV-themed edition of the unorthodox quiz show, in which contestants must come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. Playing this time are Paul Chuckle, Dani Harmer, Gwyneth Powell, George Christopher, Hacker, Dodge, Andy Day and Cerrie Burnell

programme.title: Marcus Rashford: Feeding Britain's Children
programme.desc: A look at the Manchester United and England star's campaign calling for children from poor families in England to get free meals during the school holidays. The 23 year-old striker speaks openly about his personal connection with hunger, his experiences of going without food as a child and the sacrifices his family had to make. The film also hears from those closest to him, including his mum Mel, his brothers Dwaine and Dane and his friends, while Marcus meets some of the families directly affected by the issue

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Ian is living in fear - and it seems he is right to be worried when a loud bang goes off in the Vic, leaving him cowering under a table. Tina is terrified when the police take her down to the station for questioning, Karen is distraught when Gray says he wants the kids for Christmas and Kathy is determined to have all her family together

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A funeral for a pet bird inspires Geraldine to transform the church into an ark and hold a special service for the animals of the village - but David is far from impressed by her stunt. Comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine anounces the winner of the Dibley mask competition, Hugo sets a new record as he delivers a sermon and the vicar reflects on a challenging year as Christmas draws near. The last of three mini-episodes of Richard Curtis's comedy, starring Dawn French and James Fleet

programme.title: Celebrity MasterChef Christmas Cook-Off
programme.desc: John Torode and Gregg Wallace return for the first of two festive specials as they invite memorable celebrities from previous series back to the MasterChef kitchen. Broadcaster and journalist Janet Street-Porter, actor Christopher Biggins, radio presenter Dev Griffin and TV personality Vicky Pattison compete against each other to see who can take home the title of Christmas champion

programme.title: Rhod Gilbert's Work Experience
programme.desc: The comedian tries his hand at being a classical musician with the help of the BBC National Orchestra of Wales. As he fumbles his way around the instruments to work out which suits him best, the orchestra reveal that they want him to perform with them at the Last Night of the Proms

programme.title: Mission: Impossible (1996)
programme.desc: Secret agents suspect there is a traitor in their organisation when their latest assignment ends in disaster. The sole survivor is accused of being the mole, forcing him to go on the run to clear his name. However, in the process, he discovers a former Russian spy is selling information about the world's leading undercover operatives. Action thriller based on the 1960s TV series, starring Tom Cruise, Jon Voight and Ving Rhames

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: An extended compilation of highlights from the satirical quiz, looking back at the big stories of the year with team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop and a variety of guest hosts and panellists

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Jon Kay and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: CBeebies Presents Christmas in Storyland
programme.desc: A special festive show featuring the stars of CBeebies, in which a delivery elf must take a stocking full of presents to the empress of Storyland, encountering magical creatures along the way - including a yodeling yeti. Starring , Andy Day, Justin Fletcher and Gemma Hunt

programme.title: Muppets Most Wanted (2014)
programme.desc: The Muppets prepare to head off on a world tour, unaware that Kermit has been replaced by an evil genius who is his exact double. As the dastardly interloper uses the gang's performances as cover for an international crime spree, the real Kermit is left languishing in a Russian prison. Comedy, starring Ricky Gervais, Tina Fey and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secrets of the Masters
programme.desc: Spin-off animation. Po and the Furious Five uncover the legend of three of kung fu's greatest heroes: Master Thundering Rhino, Master Storming Ox and Master Croc. Starring Jack Black, Angelina Jolie, Dustin Hoffman and Seth Rogen

programme.title: Spy in the Snow
programme.desc: Undercover cameras reveal how living in the snow tests animals to their limit. In New Zealand, cameras follow a group of kea parrots, revealing how friendship is at the heart of the lives of these sociable and highly intelligent birds. In the North Pole, cameras get up close to play-fighting polar bears, while on the other side of the planet at the South Pole, footage reveals the parental devotion that emperor penguins have as they try to secure the survival of their offspring and face some of the harshest conditions on Earth. In Tasmania, the spy wallaby finds love - discovering along the way an interesting courtship technique among wombats

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales

programme.title: Clash of the Titans (1981)
programme.desc: A hero of ancient Greece vows to save a princess from being sacrificed to a ferocious sea monster. However, to defeat the creature he must first embark on a journey into the underworld and seize the head of the monstrous Medusa, whose gaze turns men to stone. Mythical adventure, starring Harry Hamlin, Laurence Olivier, Maggie Smith and Judi Bowker, with special effects by Ray Harryhausen

programme.title: Worzel Gummidge
programme.desc: Second of two family dramas from 2019 about a walking, talking scarecrow. The Green Man, who creates scarecrows and is the keeper of scarecrow lore, arrives at the farm - and is not at all happy that Worzel is consorting with humans. Meanwhile, Susan and George go to visit Lady Bloomsbury Barton, who is holding a fete with a scarecrow competition that Worzel is determined to win. What will his most competitive rival, Soggy Bogart, make of it all? Mackenzie Crook and Michael Palin star

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: The Wrong Trousers
programme.desc: Nick Park's Oscar-winning animation featuring the bumbling inventor and his faithful dog, whose lives are turned upside down after foolishly offering board and lodgings to villainous penguin Feathers McGraw. With the voice of Peter Sallis

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present a special family edition of the general knowledge quiz, with contestants Ade Edmondson, Beattie Edmondson, Helen Richardson-Walsh, Kate Richardson-Walsh, Dr Ranj Singh, Min Singh, Mark Steel and Elliot Steel

programme.title: The Goes Wrong Show
programme.desc: The Cornley Polytechnic Drama Society put on a Nativity play in this festive special - but with the BBC refusing to fund their disastrous productions, they are forced to seek corporate sponsorship. As usual, the show descends into chaos with an ingenious pop-up book proving a danger to cast and crew alike, the two actors playing the donkey falling out, and the baby Jesus being eaten by a sheep

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: The police tell Ian that Tina has been taken in for questioning, although his relief doesn't last long when another vicious incident leaves him terrified. Max is determined to start a new life with Linda and makes her an offer. Karen feels depressed about facing her first Christmas without Chantelle and comes to a decision, while Honey discovers that the fridge is broken, meaning she will have to cancel the community event

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high-school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: Rhod Gilbert's Work Experience
programme.desc: The comedian is not known for his culinary abilities, with most of his meals prepared in the microwave. So when he is challenged to cater for the punters at a busy festival, he does not have long to learn how to come up with some fusion food that he will be able to prepare in the confines of a small tent

programme.title: Collateral (2004)
programme.desc: A Los Angeles taxi driver picks up a sharp-suited fare and is shocked when a dead body almost plunges through his windscreen during the first stop on the journey. The enigmatic passenger then reveals he is a hitman with four more contracts to carry out before the night is over, and forces the driver to help him. Michael Mann's thriller, starring Tom Cruise and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: Cuckoo
programme.desc: It's Christmas time for the Thompsons in Lichfield, and Lorna is full of yuletide spirit - in more ways than one. Ben and Dale both want to make Rachel's holiday special - and Ken gets stuck in the middle. Comedy, starring Greg Davies and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Charlie Stayt and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Crackerjack!
programme.desc: Sam and Mark host a bumper edition of filled with festive fun. Naga Munchetty and Charlie Stayt play an extra-messy game of Splatterjack, and there is also music from Becky Hill

programme.title: Nativity! (2009)
programme.desc: A primary school teacher is given the job of directing a nativity play and is determined to outdo a rival from a nearby private school. When he dishonestly claims his ex-girlfriend is a Hollywood producer and is coming to see the show with an eye on making a film, he finds himself becoming a local celebrity. Comedy, starring Martin Freeman and Ashley Jensen

programme.title: Donkey's Caroling Christmas-tacular
programme.desc: Animated short following the efforts of lovable Shrek character Donkey, who tries to get his friends in a festive mood by singing a series of Christmas songs. Featuring the voices of Eddie Murphy, Mike Myers and Cameron Diaz

programme.title: Animal Park Christmas Special
programme.desc: Highlights of Ben, Kate and Jean's week at Longleat Safari Park during the festive period, including the surprise birth of a baby aardvark, and a Christmas tree arriving in the elephant house. Elsewhere, keepers face a tough decision as they try to forge a new relationship with cheetahs Carl and Wilma

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales

programme.title: The NeverEnding Story (1984)
programme.desc: A lonely boy, neglected by his father and bullied at school, finds comfort in a mysterious book about a young hero's quest to save his world from destruction. However, as he reads the tale, he begins to become part of the story. Fantasy adventure based on Michael Edne's novel, starring Barret Oliver, Noah Hathaway, Gerald McRaney, Moses Gunn and Patricia Hayes

programme.title: Merry Madagascar
programme.desc: The animals deliver Santa's presents after he crash-lands on the island, but they plan to use the good deed as an excuse to get back to New York City. Animated adventure, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith

programme.title: Finding Dory (2016)
programme.desc: Young clownfish Nemo and his dad Marlin set out on an underwater adventure to help their forgetful friend Dory find her parents, meeting the grouchy but well-meaning octopus Hank along the way. Pixar animated sequel, featuring the voices of Ellen DeGeneres, Albert Brooks and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present a star-studded festive edition of the general knowledge quiz in which they try to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. The contestants are Dianne Buswell, Max George, Sally Phillips, Milton Jones, John Barnes MBE, Dave Beasant, Jodie Kidd and Lisa Snowdon. Plus, a special performance from Paul Heaton and Jacqui Abbott

programme.title: Mary Berry Saves Christmas
programme.desc: Mary comes to the aid of three members of the public who claim to be hopeless in the kitchen. She gives them a crash course in creating a surprise festive feast for their families, with simple recipes that capture all of the essence and flavours of the season. Helping out in the kitchen will be celebrity sous chefs Jay Blades, Tom Allen and Angela Scanlon

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Experts try to restore family heirlooms and treasured possessions to their former glory in time for Christmas. Among the items is a Victorian version of a jukebox called a Polyphon, that has rusted into silence. It moves sisters Ann and Kathryn to tears when they hear it play the family's favourite carol for the first time in decades

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Christmas comes to the haunted household of Button House in this festive special, and Alison and Mike prepare to host a family Christmas for the first time. Alison finds her phantom housemates less than filled with festive cheer, and learns that Christmas is never easy when you're dead. Mike comes up with a dubious plan to get his parents into the holiday spirit, while Julian is confronted by a new arrival, who forces him to relive memories of his life and come to terms with his past misdeeds

programme.title: Celebrity MasterChef Christmas Cook-Off
programme.desc: In this festive special, John Torode and Gregg Wallace invite some of the most memorable celebrities from series past - Craig Revel Horwood, Amar Latif, Crissy Rock and Spencer Matthews - back to the MasterChef kitchen. The foursome compete against each other in a series of challenges in the hopes of taking home the title of Christmas champion

programme.title: King Gary
programme.desc: In this festive special, Gray is looking forward to the Butterchurn Crescent Christmas lights display, which he hopes will brighten up the end of a difficult year - only for the event to be cancelled due to expense. Having landed a lucrative new contract at work, he takes it upon himself to save the lights - and Christmas

programme.title: Dolly Parton's Christmas Concert
programme.desc: Dolly Parton performs a Christmas concert featuring a host of her favourite festive songs

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The Rev Geraldine Granger delivers online sermons for her parishioners during the pandemic, beginning by explaining the difference between metres and miles when it comes to social distancing. A compilation of the 2020 editions of Richard Curtis's comedy, starring Dawn French

programme.desc: Dan Walker is joined by former players Osi Umenyiora and Jason Bell to present highlights of the 15th round of fixtures and look ahead to forthcoming contests

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize

programme.title: The Muppets (2011)
programme.desc: Three fans of the famous puppet variety show discover a powerful businessman is going to knock down the Muppet theatre and drill for oil on the site. They track down frontman Kermit the frog and persuade him to reunite his co-stars, so they can put on one last performance to save the venue. Comedy, starring Jason Segel, Amy Adams and Chris Cooper, with songs by Bret McKenzie (Flight of the Conchords)

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Kristin Scott Thomas makes an appeal on behalf of Winston's Wish, a charity providing support for bereaved children and their families

programme.title: Coronavirus: Scotland's Response
programme.desc: All the latest developments as Scotland responds to the coronavirus pandemic, plus answers to the many questions you have during these unprecedented times

programme.title: Oz the Great and Powerful (2013)
programme.desc: An amoral circus illusionist is transported to a magical land, where he is mistaken for a powerful wizard prophesied to fall from the sky and save the realm from evil. His attempt to take advantage of the situation leads him into a dangerous quest involving three powerful witches. Fantasy adventure prequel to The Wizard of Oz, starring James Franco, Mila Kunis, Rachel Weisz and Michelle Williams

programme.title: Worzel Gummidge
programme.desc: City children Susan and John are spending their summer at Scatterbrook Farm, where they are amazed to discover the scarecrow of Ten Acre Field can come to life. But it seems this extraordinary new friendship has thrown the rhythm of the natural world out of kilter and now they must work to put things right. Mackenzie Crook writes, directs and stars in the first of two new dramas from 2019 based on the books by Barbara Euphan Todd - last adapted 40 years ago in the popular ITV series with Jon Pertwee. Co-starring Steve Pemberton, Rosie Cavaliero and Vicki Pepperdine

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: A Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Nick Park's Bafta-winning film which introduced the animated inventor and his faithful canine sidekick to the world. Wallace is distraught when his cheese supplies run out, so he decides to take a trip to the moon. All he needs to do is build himself a rocket. With the voice of Peter Sallis

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman host a children's TV-themed edition of the unorthodox quiz show, in which contestants must come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. Playing this time are Paul Chuckle, Dani Harmer, Gwyneth Powell, George Christopher, Hacker, Dodge, Andy Day and Cerrie Burnell

programme.title: Marcus Rashford: Feeding Britain's Children
programme.desc: A look at the Manchester United and England star's campaign calling for children from poor families in England to get free meals during the school holidays. The 23 year-old striker speaks openly about his personal connection with hunger, his experiences of going without food as a child and the sacrifices his family had to make. The film also hears from those closest to him, including his mum Mel, his brothers Dwaine and Dane and his friends, while Marcus meets some of the families directly affected by the issue

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Ian is living in fear - and it seems he is right to be worried when a loud bang goes off in the Vic, leaving him cowering under a table. Tina is terrified when the police take her down to the station for questioning, Karen is distraught when Gray says he wants the kids for Christmas and Kathy is determined to have all her family together

programme.title: Celebrity Mastermind
programme.desc: John Humphrys asks the questions as four more famous faces take to the black chair in tonight's episode of the classic quiz where celebrities donate to their chosen charities. Comedian Omid Djalili, reality star Charlotte Crosby, TV presenter Dr Zoe Williams and former England rugby international James Haskell answer questions on the Harry Potter Films, Curb Your Enthusiasm, Nelson Mandela, and Whales, Dolphins and Porpoises

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine anounces the winner of the Dibley mask competition, Hugo sets a new record as he delivers a sermon and the vicar reflects on a challenging year as Christmas draws near. The last of three mini-episodes of Richard Curtis's comedy, starring Dawn French and James Fleet

programme.title: Celebrity MasterChef Christmas Cook-Off
programme.desc: John Torode and Gregg Wallace return for the first of two festive specials as they invite memorable celebrities from previous series back to the MasterChef kitchen. Broadcaster and journalist Janet Street-Porter, actor Christopher Biggins, radio presenter Dev Griffin and TV personality Vicky Pattison compete against each other to see who can take home the title of Christmas champion

programme.title: Mission: Impossible (1996)
programme.desc: Secret agents suspect there is a traitor in their organisation when their latest assignment ends in disaster. The sole survivor is accused of being the mole, forcing him to go on the run to clear his name. However, in the process, he discovers a former Russian spy is selling information about the world's leading undercover operatives. Action thriller based on the 1960s TV series, starring Tom Cruise, Jon Voight and Ving Rhames

programme.title: The Edit
programme.desc: The best of the week's entertainment news with Amy Irons

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: An extended compilation of highlights from the satirical quiz, looking back at the big stories of the year with team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop and a variety of guest hosts and panellists

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The host chats to George Clooney about his new sci-fi movie The Midnight Sky. Michael Sheen and David Tennant discuss playing bickering locked-down actors in the second series of Staged, while Oscar-winner Viola Davis talks about American drama Ma Rainey's Black Bottom. Vanessa Kirby reflects on starring in the searing domestic drama Pieces of a Woman and Michael Ball and Alfie Boe take to the stage to perform Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Jon Kay and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: CBeebies Presents Christmas in Storyland
programme.desc: A special festive show featuring the stars of CBeebies, in which a delivery elf must take a stocking full of presents to the empress of Storyland, encountering magical creatures along the way - including a yodeling yeti. Starring , Andy Day, Justin Fletcher and Gemma Hunt

programme.title: Muppets Most Wanted (2014)
programme.desc: The Muppets prepare to head off on a world tour, unaware that Kermit has been replaced by an evil genius who is his exact double. As the dastardly interloper uses the gang's performances as cover for an international crime spree, the real Kermit is left languishing in a Russian prison. Comedy, starring Ricky Gervais, Tina Fey and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secrets of the Masters
programme.desc: Spin-off animation. Po and the Furious Five uncover the legend of three of kung fu's greatest heroes: Master Thundering Rhino, Master Storming Ox and Master Croc. Starring Jack Black, Angelina Jolie, Dustin Hoffman and Seth Rogen

programme.title: Spy in the Snow
programme.desc: Undercover cameras reveal how living in the snow tests animals to their limit. In New Zealand, cameras follow a group of kea parrots, revealing how friendship is at the heart of the lives of these sociable and highly intelligent birds. In the North Pole, cameras get up close to play-fighting polar bears, while on the other side of the planet at the South Pole, footage reveals the parental devotion that emperor penguins have as they try to secure the survival of their offspring and face some of the harshest conditions on Earth. In Tasmania, the spy wallaby finds love - discovering along the way an interesting courtship technique among wombats

programme.title: Reporting Scotland; Weather
programme.desc: Live coverage of today's briefing from the Scottish Government on the Coronavirus outbreak

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: The Wrong Trousers
programme.desc: Nick Park's Oscar-winning animation featuring the bumbling inventor and his faithful dog, whose lives are turned upside down after foolishly offering board and lodgings to villainous penguin Feathers McGraw. With the voice of Peter Sallis

programme.title: Politics Scotland
programme.desc: Live coverage of today's briefing from the Scottish Government on the coronavirus outbreak

programme.title: Clash of the Titans (1981)
programme.desc: A hero of ancient Greece vows to save a princess from being sacrificed to a ferocious sea monster. However, to defeat the creature he must first embark on a journey into the underworld and seize the head of the monstrous Medusa, whose gaze turns men to stone. Mythical adventure, starring Harry Hamlin, Laurence Olivier, Maggie Smith and Judi Bowker, with special effects by Ray Harryhausen

programme.title: Worzel Gummidge
programme.desc: Second of two family dramas from 2019 about a walking, talking scarecrow. The Green Man, who creates scarecrows and is the keeper of scarecrow lore, arrives at the farm - and is not at all happy that Worzel is consorting with humans. Meanwhile, Susan and George go to visit Lady Bloomsbury Barton, who is holding a fete with a scarecrow competition that Worzel is determined to win. What will his most competitive rival, Soggy Bogart, make of it all? Mackenzie Crook and Michael Palin star

programme.title: The Goes Wrong Show
programme.desc: The Cornley Polytechnic Drama Society put on a Nativity play in this festive special - but with the BBC refusing to fund their disastrous productions, they are forced to seek corporate sponsorship. As usual, the show descends into chaos with an ingenious pop-up book proving a danger to cast and crew alike, the two actors playing the donkey falling out, and the baby Jesus being eaten by a sheep

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: The police tell Ian that Tina has been taken in for questioning, although his relief doesn't last long when another vicious incident leaves him terrified. Max is determined to start a new life with Linda and makes her an offer. Karen feels depressed about facing her first Christmas without Chantelle and comes to a decision, while Honey discovers that the fridge is broken, meaning she will have to cancel the community event

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high-school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: Collateral (2004)
programme.desc: A Los Angeles taxi driver picks up a sharp-suited fare and is shocked when a dead body almost plunges through his windscreen during the first stop on the journey. The enigmatic passenger then reveals he is a hitman with four more contracts to carry out before the night is over, and forces the driver to help him. Michael Mann's thriller, starring Tom Cruise and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: Cuckoo
programme.desc: It's Christmas time for the Thompsons in Lichfield, and Lorna is full of yuletide spirit - in more ways than one. Ben and Dale both want to make Rachel's holiday special - and Ken gets stuck in the middle. Comedy, starring Greg Davies and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Bad Education
programme.desc: Mr Fraser appoints Alfie as director for the Christmas production, and decides to cast the school bully as the lead in a combination of Robocop and the Nutcracker, called Robocracker. Meanwhile, Mitchell tries to lure Alfie's estranged mother from her home in Spain as a surprise, and Miss Gulliver attempts to persuade her class to volunteer in a soup kitchen

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Charlie Stayt and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Crackerjack!
programme.desc: Sam and Mark host a bumper edition of filled with festive fun. Naga Munchetty and Charlie Stayt play an extra-messy game of Splatterjack, and there is also music from Becky Hill

programme.title: Snow Animals
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin introduces a cast of charismatic animals to reveal the remarkable strategies they use to survive, and even thrive, in the winter. Preparations start in autumn for Siberian chipmunks, which collect food in their cheek pouches to stockpile in their burrows, while caribou make an epic journey to new feeding areas away from the worst weather. With the arrival of winter, an American bobcat has to find its prey beneath deep snow, an arctic fox relies on its wits to find a meal, and a sea otter keeps its cub warm by blowing air into its coat

programme.title: Animal Park Christmas Special
programme.desc: Highlights of Ben, Kate and Jean's week at Longleat Safari Park during the festive period, including the surprise birth of a baby aardvark, and a Christmas tree arriving in the elephant house. Elsewhere, keepers face a tough decision as they try to forge a new relationship with cheetahs Carl and Wilma

programme.title: Donkey's Caroling Christmas-tacular
programme.desc: Animated short following the efforts of lovable Shrek character Donkey, who tries to get his friends in a festive mood by singing a series of Christmas songs. Featuring the voices of Eddie Murphy, Mike Myers and Cameron Diaz

programme.title: First Minister's Questions
programme.desc: Kirsten Campbell presents live coverage of questions to First Minister Nicola Sturgeon in the Scottish Parliament

programme.title: The NeverEnding Story (1984)
programme.desc: A lonely boy, neglected by his father and bullied at school, finds comfort in a mysterious book about a young hero's quest to save his world from destruction. However, as he reads the tale, he begins to become part of the story. Fantasy adventure based on Michael Edne's novel, starring Barret Oliver, Noah Hathaway, Gerald McRaney, Moses Gunn and Patricia Hayes

programme.title: Merry Madagascar
programme.desc: The animals deliver Santa's presents after he crash-lands on the island, but they plan to use the good deed as an excuse to get back to New York City. Animated adventure, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith

programme.title: Finding Dory (2016)
programme.desc: Young clownfish Nemo and his dad Marlin set out on an underwater adventure to help their forgetful friend Dory find her parents, meeting the grouchy but well-meaning octopus Hank along the way. Pixar animated sequel, featuring the voices of Ellen DeGeneres, Albert Brooks and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present a star-studded festive edition of the general knowledge quiz in which they try to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. The contestants are Dianne Buswell, Max George, Sally Phillips, Milton Jones, John Barnes MBE, Dave Beasant, Jodie Kidd and Lisa Snowdon. Plus, a special performance from Paul Heaton and Jacqui Abbott

programme.title: Mary Berry Saves Christmas
programme.desc: Mary comes to the aid of three members of the public who claim to be hopeless in the kitchen. She gives them a crash course in creating a surprise festive feast for their families, with simple recipes that capture all of the essence and flavours of the season. Helping out in the kitchen will be celebrity sous chefs Jay Blades, Tom Allen and Angela Scanlon

programme.title: Pure Magic
programme.desc: Magicians Colin Cloud, Katherine Mills, Magical Bones and Ben Hart a series of jaw-dropping illusions and dazzling acts of mentalism in four different Scottish locations - The Forth Bridge; Blackness Castle; Edinburgh's Botanic Gardens and Dynamic Earth - before coming together to stage a show to an audience of four hundred at Glasgow's Fruitmarket

programme.title: River City
programme.desc: Poppy's life spirals out of control when her stalker sabotages an important business meeting, while Paul is lured into a false sense of security when Lenny tries to bond with him. Affairs of the heart bring festive cheer to Angus and Rebecca

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Christmas comes to the haunted household of Button House in this festive special, and Alison and Mike prepare to host a family Christmas for the first time. Alison finds her phantom housemates less than filled with festive cheer, and learns that Christmas is never easy when you're dead. Mike comes up with a dubious plan to get his parents into the holiday spirit, while Julian is confronted by a new arrival, who forces him to relive memories of his life and come to terms with his past misdeeds

programme.title: Celebrity MasterChef Christmas Cook-Off
programme.desc: In this festive special, John Torode and Gregg Wallace invite some of the most memorable celebrities from series past - Craig Revel Horwood, Amar Latif, Crissy Rock and Spencer Matthews - back to the MasterChef kitchen. The foursome compete against each other in a series of challenges in the hopes of taking home the title of Christmas champion

programme.title: King Gary
programme.desc: In this festive special, Gray is looking forward to the Butterchurn Crescent Christmas lights display, which he hopes will brighten up the end of a difficult year - only for the event to be cancelled due to expense. Having landed a lucrative new contract at work, he takes it upon himself to save the lights - and Christmas

programme.title: Dolly Parton's Christmas Concert
programme.desc: Dolly Parton performs a Christmas concert featuring a host of her favourite festive songs

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The Rev Geraldine Granger delivers online sermons for her parishioners during the pandemic, beginning by explaining the difference between metres and miles when it comes to social distancing. A compilation of the 2020 editions of Richard Curtis's comedy, starring Dawn French

programme.title: The NFL Show
programme.desc: Dan Walker is joined by former players Osi Umenyiora and Jason Bell to present highlights of the 15th round of fixtures and look ahead to forthcoming contests

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Jon Kay and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Tinker Bell and the Legend of the NeverBeast (2014)
programme.desc: One of Tinker Bell's friends meets a large hairy monster, and discovers he is not as fearsome as he looks. However, she has a hard time convincing the other fairies to accept him, and needs the help of her friends to protect the creature. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Mae Whitman, Ginnifer Goodwin and Rosario Dawson

programme.title: The Muppets (2011)
programme.desc: Three fans of the famous puppet variety show discover a powerful businessman is going to knock down the Muppet theatre and drill for oil on the site. They track down frontman Kermit the frog and persuade him to reunite his co-stars, so they can put on one last performance to save the venue. programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A funeral for a pet bird inspires Geraldine to transform the church into an ark and hold a special service for the animals of the village - but David is far from impressed by her stunt. Comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine anounces the winner of the Dibley mask competition, Hugo sets a new record as he delivers a sermon and the vicar reflects on a challenging year as Christmas draws near. The last of three mini-episodes of Richard Curtis's comedy, starring Dawn French and James Fleet

programme.title: Celebrity MasterChef Christmas Cook-Off

Broadcaster and journalist Janet Street-Porter, actor Christopher Biggins, radio presenter Dev Griffin and TV personality Vicky Pattison compete against each other to see who can take home the title of Christmas champion

programme.title: The Paddy Raff Comedy Show
programme.desc: Sketches from the Belfast stand-up and social-media sensation about the festive mayhem and family traditions unique to Northern Ireland. Malone Road's most talked about resident Nigel reveals some family history and his part in the Christmas Story, while Father Pat hosts a rave in a manger, and Granny Raff announces her naughty list. With guest appearances by Michael Smiley and Bronagh Taggart

programme.title: Keepin 'er Country
programme.desc: For brothers Nathan and Jake Carter, Christmas means family, music and craic, and while this year might be a little different they are determined to celebrate the only way they know how - a good old country music-inspired celebration from their Fermanagh home. The musical duo perform a host of their favourite Christmas tunes and introduce some very special guests, including Lisa McHugh, Robert Mizzell and Cliona Hagan

programme.title: Community Life
programme.desc: An appeal on behalf of the Welcome Organisation, which provides a range of services to around 1,400 people affected by homelessness across greater Belfast every year

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: An extended compilation of highlights from the satirical quiz, looking back at the big stories of the year with team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop and a variety of guest hosts and panellists

programme.title: Nativity! (2009)
programme.desc: A primary school teacher is given the job of directing a nativity play and is determined to outdo a rival from a nearby private school. When he dishonestly claims his ex-girlfriend is a Hollywood producer and is coming to see the show with an eye on making a film, he finds himself becoming a local celebrity. Comedy, starring Martin Freeman and Ashley Jensen

programme.title: Donkey's Caroling Christmas-tacular
programme.desc: Animated short following the efforts of lovable Shrek character Donkey, who tries to get his friends in a festive mood by singing a series of Christmas songs. Featuring the voices of Eddie Murphy, Mike Myers and Cameron Diaz

programme.title: Animal Park Christmas Special
programme.desc: Highlights of Ben, Kate and Jean's week at Longleat Safari Park during the festive period, including the surprise birth of a baby aardvark, and a Christmas tree arriving in the elephant house. Elsewhere, keepers face a tough decision as they try to forge a new relationship with cheetahs Carl and Wilma

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: The NeverEnding Story (1984)
programme.desc: A lonely boy, neglected by his father and bullied at school, finds comfort in a mysterious book about a young hero's quest to save his world from destruction. However, as he reads the tale, he begins to become part of the story. Fantasy adventure based on Michael Edne's novel, starring Barret Oliver, Noah Hathaway, Gerald McRaney, Moses Gunn and Patricia Hayes

programme.title: Merry Madagascar
programme.desc: The animals deliver Santa's presents after he crash-lands on the island, but they plan to use the good deed as an excuse to get back to New York City. Animated adventure, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith

programme.title: Finding Dory (2016)
programme.desc: Young clownfish Nemo and his dad Marlin set out on an underwater adventure to help their forgetful friend Dory find her parents, meeting the grouchy but well-meaning octopus Hank along the way. Pixar animated sequel, featuring the voices of Ellen DeGeneres, Albert Brooks and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present a star-studded festive edition of the general knowledge quiz in which they try to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. The contestants are Dianne Buswell, Max George, Sally Phillips, Milton Jones, John Barnes MBE, Dave Beasant, Jodie Kidd and Lisa Snowdon. Plus, a special performance from Paul Heaton and Jacqui Abbott

programme.title: Mary Berry Saves Christmas
programme.desc: Mary comes to the aid of three members of the public who claim to be hopeless in the kitchen. She gives them a crash course in creating a surprise festive feast for their families, with simple recipes that capture all of the essence and flavours of the season. Helping out in the kitchen will be celebrity sous chefs Jay Blades, Tom Allen and Angela Scanlon

programme.title: A Northern Irish Christmas
programme.desc: A special Christmas programme full of festive fun, nostalgia and heart-warming stories of Northern Ireland's favourite Christmas moments. Stories include how Kylie Minogue inspired a super fan's Christmas drag act, the impact of Band Aid's hit song Do they know it's Christmas on the nation, Bill Clinton's Christmas light switch on, and how a Belfast toy shop made dreams come true for children in the 1970s and 1980s

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Christmas comes to the haunted household of Button House in this festive special, and Alison and Mike prepare to host a family Christmas for the first time. Alison finds her phantom housemates less than filled with festive cheer, and learns that Christmas is never easy when you're dead. Mike comes up with a dubious plan to get his parents into the holiday spirit, while Julian is confronted by a new arrival, who forces him to relive memories of his life and come to terms with his past misdeeds

programme.title: Celebrity MasterChef Christmas Cook-Off
programme.desc: In this festive special, John Torode and Gregg Wallace invite some of the most memorable celebrities from series past - Craig Revel Horwood, Amar Latif, Crissy Rock and Spencer Matthews - back to the MasterChef kitchen. The foursome compete against each other in a series of challenges in the hopes of taking home the title of Christmas champion

programme.title: King Gary
programme.desc: In this festive special, Gray is looking forward to the Butterchurn Crescent Christmas lights display, which he hopes will brighten up the end of a difficult year - only for the event to be cancelled due to expense. Having landed a lucrative new contract at work, he takes it upon himself to save the lights - and Christmas

programme.title: Dolly Parton's Christmas Concert
programme.desc: Dolly Parton performs a Christmas concert featuring a host of her favourite festive songs

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The Rev Geraldine Granger delivers online sermons for her parishioners during the pandemic, beginning by explaining the difference between metres and miles when it comes to social distancing. A compilation of the 2020 editions of Richard Curtis's comedy, starring Dawn French

programme.title: The NFL Show
programme.desc: Dan Walker is joined by former players Osi Umenyiora and Jason Bell to present highlights of the 15th round of fixtures and look ahead to forthcoming contests

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize

programme.title: HARDtalk
programme.desc: The US electoral college has spoken, even if outgoing president Donald Trump refuses to hear it. Joe Biden categorically and conclusively won the White House and will be moving in next month. So what now for the enraged incumbent and his most loyal associates? Stephen Sackur interviews Chris Ruddy, CEO and owner of Newsmax, the right-wing media organisation that's tried to ‘outfox' Fox News by being ‘Trumpier' than Trump. Is post-Trump America destined to be paralysed with division?

programme.title: Guatemala's Lost World
programme.desc: The Maya Biosphere Reserve is the largest rainforest north of the Amazon and was once the heart of the Maya civilisation. Amanda Ruggeri explores the new technology that is allowing archaeologists to explore the hundreds of structures still hidden beneath the jungle.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international stories as they break

programme.title: 100 Women
programme.desc: For thousands of years, the Inuit people lived off the land. Nomadic hunters, chasing targets depending on the seasons. Now those weather patterns have utterly and irreversibly shifted. Locals say that sea ice used to form in September. Now, it forms in October or as late as November. The Arctic is now warming at least twice as fast as the rest of the globe, according to the Arctic Program Report Card. Climate change is threatening the Inuits’ survival - both physically and mentally. Inuit women are trying to hold their families together through it all. Life on Thin Ice follows three generations of Inuit women; a grandmother, mother and daughter to see the impact that climate change has had on their community. What else have they lost along with the ice?

programme.desc: The Gruffalo's daughter takes a journey through a dark wood in search of the mouse that scared her father, encountering many of his old acquaintances along the way

programme.title: Stòiridh
programme.desc: Joy Dunlop reads Na Rionnagan Dìreach Shuas an t-Sràid, written by Sue Soltis, illustrated by Christine Davenier and translated into Gaelic by Morag Stewart

programme.title: Saoghal Bodach na Nollaig
programme.desc: Paco exhibits his artistic talents with a collection of very interesting paintings

programme.title: Spaidhc is na Fèidh Lochlannach (Spike 2)
programme.desc: Spike, Dorothy and Paco endeavour to scupper evil Tony's plans when the kidnapping of the reindeers threatens to ruin Christmas

programme.title: Geamaichean Gorach
programme.desc: The gang are busy, but the day ends with disappointment

programme.title: Am Balach anns a' Bhuilgean (Boy in the Bubble)
programme.desc: A boy suffers heartache for the first time and turns to a book of magic for a spell that shields him from emotion, leaving him stuck in a bubble

programme.title: Gaisgich na Stoirme (Storm Heroes)
programme.desc: Donnie Mackay investigates flooding along the River Tay. Lorry driver Murdo John Mackay crosses Scotland in all weathers, and it's CalMac handyman Alasdair MacIver's last day at work after 28 years at sea. In South Uist, the SSEN team members make a special delivery.

programme.title: Speaking Our Language
programme.desc: An opportunity to learn Gaelic. Presented by Rhoda MacDonald

programme.title: Earrann Eachdraidh (History Shorts)
programme.desc: A convention for twins

programme.title: An Là (News)
programme.desc: Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA

programme.title: Port
programme.desc: Bruce MacGregor, Liz Doherty, Mhairi Hall and Mike Vass gather in Inverness to lend musical weight to Falls of Lora

programme.title: Two Go to Tolsta - Sgeulachd Syd Agus Millie
programme.desc: The remarkable story of Millie and Syd, two children from Hertfordshire who ran away to their grandparents' in 1949

programme.title: Bho Chaorain Gu Consoles
programme.desc: A nostalgic trip down memory lane, remembering the presents that brought magic to cold Christmas mornings over the decades. There are all kinds of gifts - puzzles and games have come and gone over the years, from the head-scratching angst of the Rubiks Cube through to the family fun of Monopoly, while electronic games - from Space Invaders all the way through to Playstations - are abidingly popular

programme.title: Scottish Premiership Football
programme.desc: Hibernian v St Mirren. A chance to see the top-flight encounter at Easter Road. Commentary from Hugh Dan MacLennan

programme.title: An t-Inneal Espresso/The Espresso Machine
programme.desc: Drama revolving around a high-end espresso machine. Ealasaid loaned her machine to Ailig's girlfriend Una, and desperately wants it back. Unfortunately, Ailig and Una just broke up

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: BBC Alba joins Radio nan Gàidheal, the BBC's Gaelic language radio service

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Oscar-winning actor Jamie Foxx chats with Ross King in Los Angeles about starring in Pixar animated comedy adventure Soul. Lorraine Kelly presents

programme.title: Celebrity Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a star-studded edition of the game show, with contestants Scarlett Moffatt, Jacqueline Jossa, John Barnes, David Seaman, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph racing down the aisles to win a £10,000 jackpot for the charity of their choice

programme.title: In for a Penny
programme.desc: In this edition, Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show from Swansea, setting members of the public unusual challenges for a chance to win anything from the price of their petrol to £1,000 in the big finale game

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: It's a time of joy and happiness in Midsomer for once - Christmas is coming, and DCI Barnaby and his wife Sarah are soon to become parents. But the festive mood changes when a man is stabbed to death with an antique sword during a ghost-hunting party at a spooky manor house in Morton Shallows. Is blacksmith's daughter Rose Wilton seeking revenge from beyond the grave, or will Barnaby and sidekick Charlie Nelson find a more earthly motive behind the murder? Starring Neil Dudgeon and Gwilym Lee, with Fiona Dolman, Les Dennis, Elizabeth Berrington, Mark Heap, Emily Joyce, James Murray and Hannah Tointon

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson presents highlights from the show, including Cheryl Hakeney bidding for some Shelley china and £10 junk shop bargain doing well at auction to everyone's surprise

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts as a celebrity team from the world of politics take on the Tenable Tower. Ann Widdecombe, Edwina Currie, John Sergeant, George Galloway and Lembit Opik must join forces as they attempt to win £125,000 for their charities

programme.title: Tipping Point: Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Ben Shephard invites celebrities to take part in a special edition of the quiz show, in which contestants Julian Clary, Sara Cox and Alan Halsall answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the better their chances of collecting the £20,000 prize for their selected charity

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents a special festive episode in which celebrity contestants Patti Clare, Matt Richardson, Kirsty Wark and Jimmy Osmond pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for charity. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chas has regrets, Paul is concerned and Jamie returns from his trip

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Nick learns that Sam is moving to London with Natasha, and Shona's actions leave David at Ray's mercy. Elsewhere, Paul agrees to meet a distressed Will, and a police officer approaches Sarah and questions her about Rick's watch

programme.title: Ainsley's Food We Love
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott is joined by guest Jeremy Pang to re-create takeaway dishes. The host begins with the Caribbean classic of jerk pork belly with roti and coconut and mango slaw, then rounds things off with a trip to India, with his take on a cauliflower, butternut and spinach dhansak. Meanwhile, Jeremy rustles up a Chinese dish of crispy chilli beef

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Adamant that he doesn't want to move to London, Sam begs Nick to let him move in with him and Leanne. Todd covers for Paul as he deceives Billy, and David reaches a sad decision regarding Shona

programme.title: The Big Quiz
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a special edition of the quiz show in which teams from ITV's biggest soaps battle it out. Jack P Shepherd captains the Coronation Street team and is joined by Simon Gregson and Sair Khan, while Mark Charnock takes the lead for Emmerdale, alongside Karen Blick and Jay Kontzle

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: The Savoy
programme.desc: Documentary following life in the glamorous London hotel over the festive season, as staff prepare to welcome guests during the hotel's most profitable time of the year. Head butler Sean braces new recruit Michael for how busy he is going to be, while restaurant director Anne prepares the four restaurants and her 160 staff. Cameras also follow regular guest Howell Harris as he spends his first Christmas at the hotel since his mother died, with staff going above and beyond to make sure he has a holiday to remember

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley

programme.title: Back to Mine
programme.desc: Globetrotting Emma is house hunting for love with the help of her cousin Kelly - and she has a substantial list of demands to be met as she visits three single men's homes. In the running is a rugby player, a trendy musician and a bodybuilder. Which one will she choose to go back to her house for a date?

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: In for a Penny
programme.desc: In this edition, Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show from York, setting members of the public unusual challenges for a chance to win anything from the price of their petrol to £1,000 in the big finale game

programme.title: Arthur Christmas (2011)
programme.desc: Santa Claus' gift-giving routine has developed into a complex hi-tech operation. However, when one girl is accidentally missed out, his youngest son Arthur takes control of the family sleigh to deliver her gifts the old-fashioned way - but following in his father's footsteps is not as easy as it looks. Animated comedy, with the voices of James McAvoy, Jim Broadbent and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson helps members of the public in Hartlepool sort the treasures from their trash, including an execution poster and a classic Gibson guitar

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts as a team of former I'm a Celebrity camp-mates take on the Tenable Tower for the chance to win £125,000 for their charities

programme.title: Tipping Point: Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts a special seasonal edition of the quiz, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine in the hope of winning £20,000 for charity. Donning panto outfits to get into the festive spirit - oh yes they do - Lesley Joseph, Vicky Pattison and Christopher Biggins all bid to land their charities a Christmas gift to remember

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents a festive episode in which celebrity contestants John Inverdale, Judy Murray, Bernard Cribbins and Scarlett Moffatt pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Andrea is left fuming, Laurel is full of self-loathing, and Paddy panics

programme.title: For the Love of Britain
programme.desc: Julie Walters and other presenters explore Yorkshire. Julia Bradbury visits the windswept moors that were home to the Bronte sisters. Robson Green sings shanties in the seaside resort of Whitby, and Ore Oduba hits the Coast to Coast walking trail near the market town of Richmond. Deep in the Dales, Adrian Edmondson presents a guide to the Malham Circuit, one of Yorkshire's best-loved hikes

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones are called away from a team-building exercise to investigate a fatal explosion at a haulage yard in Calham Cross. The property is owned by Territorial Army commanding officer Matt Parkes, the father of a businessman whose ruthlessness in the boardroom is matched only by his behaviour toward women. To complicate matters, the village is also home to a peace protester and a grieving mother - and Barnaby has to decide if any of these locals is capable of arson and murder. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with Tim Pigott-Smith, Joseph Millson, Niamh Cusack, Judy Parfitt and Nick Fletcher

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Bradley Walsh's How to Win a Game Show
programme.desc: The Chase host provides an insight into how to triumph on a TV quiz, featuring classic archive clips. Bradley rounds up a gathering of his fellow presenters, including Ant and Dec, who explain how lying can sometimes pay off, and Stephen Mulhern, who describes the mindset needed to beat Catchphrase. Also dropping in are Bradley's supporting cast of Chasers, who reveal how they prepare for an episode

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire: The Million Pound Question
programme.desc: A look back at the 2006 win of Ingram Wilcox as he relives his most memorable moments from the game that changed his life. Plus, another chance to see Paul McCartney, George Michael and Ronan Keating on the show

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team visit Eastleigh, near Southampton, to transform an uneven patch of lawn into a cruise ship-inspired pleasure garden complete with a patio shaped like the prow of a boat. The project is intended as a 'thank-you' to paediatric nurse Rosie Mitchell, whose nominees claim she has gone above and beyond the call of duty for 30 years in support of her young patients

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Celebrity Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a star-studded edition of the game show, with contestants Martine McCutcheon and her husband, Joel Dommett and Denise Van Outen, and Aston Merrygold and JB Gill from JLS racing down the aisles to win a £10,000 jackpot for the charity of their choice

programme.title: In for a Penny
programme.desc: In this edition, Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show from Liverpool, setting members of the public unusual challenges for a chance to win anything from the price of their petrol to £1,000 in the big finale game

programme.title: Fred Claus (2007)
programme.desc: Santa's selfish brother Fred has been ostracised by his family for years, but when his crooked ways land him in jail, his brother comes along to bail him out on one condition - he must return to the family business and make toys for Christmas. But instead of cleaning up his act, Fred pushes Santa's patience to the limit with his far from festive attitude. Comedy, starring Vince Vaughn, Paul Giamatti, Rachel Weisz, Miranda Richardson and Kevin Spacey

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: Memorable moments from the show with David Dickinson and his team of antiques dealers. Karen Dalmeny is brought a bowl that may or may not be genuine Worcester. Does she know the answer? Michael Hogben views a collection of vintage puppets, Jon O'Marah tries to buy an old sword and an Amethyst pendant brings tears at auction

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Celebrity version of the quiz show hosted by Warwick Davis, in which a team of five Olympians answer questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge for the chance to win £125,000 for charity

programme.title: Tipping Point: Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts a special seasonal edition of the quiz, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine in the hope of winning £20,000 for charity. This time, the famous faces taking part are comedian Joe Pasquale, TV personality Rustie Lee, and actress Nina Wadia

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents a festive episode in which the Rev Kate Bottley, Dr Ranj Singh, Made in Chelsea's Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo and comedian Ed Byrne pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mack covers his tracks, Liv reveals a secret, and Paddy reels

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: The police call at the salon flat and haul Gary in for questioning regarding the disappearance of Rick Neelan. Leanne makes an effort for Nick and Sam, and Chesney and Kirk experience a market downturn

programme.title: Chefs' Burnt Bits
programme.desc: In a special selection of comical bloopers, famous TV cooks including Gino D'Acampo, James Martin, Ainsley Harriott and Lisa Faulkner look back at times they made mistakes live on air for millions of viewers to see

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sarah calls at the salon flat and rails at Gary, accusing him of moving Rick's body to save his own skin, which Maria overhears. Leanne persuades Nick to put his son first, and Roy and Nina urge Shona to talk to David

programme.title: Jennifer Saunders' Memory Lane
programme.desc: Jennifer slips behind the wheel of a classic red Jaguar E-Type, joined in the passenger seat by Hollywood actor Michael Sheen whom she quizzes about his life and times. Heading to Port Talbot where Michael grew up, they stop at key locations to prompt personal stories from his childhood right up to the present day. Drawing on evocative family photos and colourful local archive, Michael's recollections are by turns funny, surprising and incredibly poignant

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Knocked Up (2007)
programme.desc: Ambitious journalist Alison's one-night stand with directionless layabout Ben has unexpected consequences when she discovers she is pregnant. However, the unlikely parents-to-be decide to give the relationship a try for their baby's sake, forcing Ben to face the challenge of accepting responsibility for the first time in his life. Romantic comedy, starring Seth Rogen, Katherine Heigl and Paul Rudd

programme.title: Living on the Veg
programme.desc: Vegetarian food ideas, presented by Henry Firth and Ian Theasby. First on the menu are Sunday roast, vegan cheese in a toasted sandwich, sticky toffee pudding and snack ideas using avocados. The hosts are joined by actress Sadie Frost, who tries their jalfrezi curry
