programme.desc: A look back at the 2006 win of Ingram Wilcox as he relives his most memorable moments from the game that changed his life. Plus, another chance to see Paul McCartney, George Michael and Ronan Keating on the show

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team visit Eastleigh, near Southampton, to transform an uneven patch of lawn into a cruise ship-inspired pleasure garden complete with a patio shaped like the prow of a boat. The project is intended as a 'thank-you' to paediatric nurse Rosie Mitchell, whose nominees claim she has gone above and beyond the call of duty for 30 years in support of her young patients

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features

programme.title: Lorraine

programme.title: Fred Claus (2007)
programme.desc: Santa's selfish brother Fred has been ostracised by his family for years, but when his crooked ways land him in jail, his brother comes along to bail him out on one condition - he must return to the family business and make toys for Christmas. But instead of cleaning up his act, Fred pushes Santa's patience to the limit with his far from festive attitude. Comedy, starring Vince Vaughn, Paul Giamatti, Rachel Weisz, Miranda Richardson and Kevin Spacey

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: Memorable moments from the show with David Dickinson and his team of antiques dealers. Karen Dalmeny is brought a bowl that may or may not be genuine Worcester. Does she know the answer? Michael Hogben views a collection of vintage puppets, Jon O'Marah tries to buy an old sword and an Amethyst pendant brings tears at auction

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Celebrity version of the quiz show hosted by Warwick Davis, in which a team of five Olympians answer questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge for the chance to win £125,000 for charity

programme.title: Tipping Point: Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts a special seasonal edition of the quiz, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine in the hope of winning £20,000 for charity. This time, the famous faces taking part are comedian Joe Pasquale, TV personality Rustie Lee, and actress Nina Wadia

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents a festive episode in which the Rev Kate Bottley, Dr Ranj Singh, Made in Chelsea's Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo and comedian Ed Byrne pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mack covers his tracks, Liv reveals a secret, and Paddy reels

programme.title: Coronation Street

programme.title: Jennifer Saunders' Memory Lane
programme.desc: Jennifer slips behind the wheel of a classic red Jaguar E-Type, joined in the passenger seat by Hollywood actor Michael Sheen whom she quizzes about his life and times. Heading to Port Talbot where Michael grew up, they stop at key locations to prompt personal stories from his childhood right up to the present day. Drawing on evocative family photos and colourful local archive, Michael's recollections are by turns funny, surprising and incredibly poignant

programme.desc: Ambitious journalist Alison's one-night stand with directionless layabout Ben has unexpected consequences when she discovers she is pregnant. However, the unlikely parents-to-be decide to give the relationship a try for their baby's sake, forcing Ben to face the challenge of accepting responsibility for the first time in his life. Romantic comedy, starring Seth Rogen, Katherine Heigl and Paul Rudd

After the first elimination, the two remaining players battle to reach the Super Catchphrase round, where one of them could win £50,000

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Comedian Harry Hill narrates a festive selection of camcorder calamities and viewers' mobile phone-footage, focusing on seasonal catastrophes. The clips include a dog relieving itself on a Christmas tree, Santas failing to keep their footing, and children with the wrong attitude at a time of giving. Plus, faulty fairy lights that came as a nasty shock at yuletide

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Comedian Harry Hill narrates a selection of festive camcorder calamities and mobile phone footage, featuring rocking around the Christmas tree and five ways to kill a snowman

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a festive and comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring everything from a kid wrestling a Christmas tree to the world's most terrifying present - Carrie the possessed car

programme.title: Nanny McPhee and the Big Bang (2010)
programme.desc: A woman is left running the family farm alone while her husband is fighting in the Second World War. The wart-faced magical nanny is on hand to help her cope with her unruly children, their even more mischievous evacuated cousins, and her scheming brother-in-law, who wants the farm for himself. Fantasy comedy, with Emma Thompson, Maggie Gyllenhaal and Sam Kelly

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: Economic unrest ensues after King Leopold cuts off access to the Belgian Congo, so years after leaving his old home behind, Tarzan is lured back from Victorian England hoping to stabilise matters. However, he soon finds he has been lured into a deadly trap orchestrated by one of Leopold's envoys. Adventure, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Margot Robbie and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7 (2015)
programme.desc: After defeating Owen Shaw and his crew and securing amnesty for their past crimes, Dom, Brian and the rest of the team return home to live normal lives again. However Shaw's older brother Deckard - a rogue special forces assassin vows revenge on Dom, who he holds responsible for leaving Owen in a coma. Action thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Jason Statham and Paul Walker in his last film role

However Shaw's older brother Deckard - a rogue special forces assassin vows revenge on Dom, who he holds responsible for leaving Owen in a coma. Action thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Jason Statham and Paul Walker in his last film role

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter is asked to fill in for a mall Santa, but soon gets drunk on power when he realises that he can get away with anything while dressed as Father Christmas. Meanwhile, Stewie and Brian crash holiday office parties for free food, drama and women

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: While sitting through the high school talent show, Peter becomes enraptured by the violin performance of a student and convinces Cleveland, Joe and Quagmire to join him in forming a string quartet. However, when they secure a wedding gig and find that Peter has neglected to practise, they kick him out. Meanwhile, Brian is forced into being Carter's guide dog

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger converts to Judaism after he feels unappreciated by the family. In a twist of fate, he puts on Santa's suit and becomes 'Schmanta'

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: In his continuing quest to meet girls, Steve decides to try to earn a letter jacket by joining the school's water polo team. When his initial attempt fails, he enlists Klaus' help to make the squad, and soon becomes the team's star player. Meanwhile, Stan and Roger buy a sailboat, but find life on water is not so easy as they imagined

programme.title: Shopping with Keith Lemon
programme.desc: Keith picks out stocking fillers with Strictly star Michelle Visage, looks for gifts with singer Ella Eyre and finds the perfect party dress with This Morning's Holly Willoughby

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden hopes to create the perfect Christmas experience for Louis, who has lost his faith in the festivities, but Alan's cheapness - as well as his mother - threaten to ruin everything. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer and Ashton Kutcher

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: In the second part of the last-ever episode, the question of whether hard-living raconteur Charlie Harper is really dead is finally answered, as Alan and his friends are terrorised by a vengeful figure with a penchant for sending ominous notes. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer, with a few surprise cameos to mark the long-running show's final goodbye

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan is upset when he discovers Lyndsey failed to tell him that she broke up with Larry. Meanwhile, Walden endeavours to prove his masculinity after it is questioned. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer and Ashton Kutcher

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Jenny worries that she and Brooke aren't as close as they used to be and makes a plan to remedy that. When Lyndsey rejects Alan's ultimatum, he drowns his sorrows at his ex-wife Judith's house. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: Michael Jackson impersonator Mitch, bar manager Aiden and student JJ try to impress Becky, a student from Leeds, with their outfit choices

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz entertains Maureen and Deirdre at Singles' Night at the Warwick. Gary rows with Judy for giving Zoe their money. Angie makes a pass at Chris

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maureen is alarmed when Fred keeps calling her. Deirdre is thrilled when Jon asks her out. Kevin is stunned when Natalie tells him she loves him

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak takes advantage of Marlon being in charge at the wine bar. The Cairns family load up the car ready to leave for Germany. Alan tries to talk Eric out of his depression

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy is furious about the mess the Dingles have caused at the tearooms. Steve is relieved when Kim agrees to sign his contract. Scott tells Lyn he's not happy in the army

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A gang of bikers wreaks havoc in Aidensfield, prompting the locals to demand a new bobby. When young recruit PC Joe Mason (Joe McFadden) arrives he is not quite what they expected, with his tactics for crime fighting making his reception a mixed one between both residents and fellow police officers

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid takes a little exercise and Trevor decides to join him. Seventies sitcom, starring Sid James and Anthony Jackson

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Mike takes up photography, and persuades Sid to let him use the old garage for his new hobby. Family comedy, starring Sid James, Diana Coupland and Robin Stewart

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: As Brent Park Cricket Club prepare for the opening ceremony of their new pitch and pavilion, Mim arranges a big surprise for Rog - but disaster is waiting in the wings. Comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: On the Buses (1971)
programme.desc: Wily bus driver Stan Butler thinks a new company policy that allows women behind the wheel will rob him of his precious overtime money. Enlisting the aid of conductor Jack, he does everything he can to sabotage the plan. Comedy, based on the TV series, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant, Stephen Lewis, Doris Hare, Peter Madden and Anna Karen

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A teenager arrives in the village asking for directions to Ashfordly Hall - and claims to be looking for her father. David decides to make a will, but becomes paranoid when one of the beneficiaries seems too eager to inherit, and a series of accidents befall him. Elsewhere, a new arrival at the Fossett farm is named after Joe. Guest starring Ophelia Lovibond

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jan receives the injunction from Kim's solicitors. Zak embarks on another money-making scheme. Marlon is approached by the police for serving alcohol to under-age children

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe refuses to be bullied by Kim and Steve into giving Kelly a job. Emma insists that she does not want to go back to Germany. Tara confronts Steve about his dad

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin and Natalie plan to spend the night together. The McDonalds go to pick up Steve when he is released from prison. Alma tells Curly she still wants to work at Firman's

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike is annoyed to find out Angie has employed Ida and Janice. Jim is sad that Steve does not want to work with him, and he plans to win Fiona back

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis struggle to determine whether a death during a college-based clinical trial for a new antidepressant was murder or suicide, and receive little assistance from the institution's evasive psychiatric professor. A second student's demise then leads to the revelation that the trial's participants are all operating under the influence of a mind-altering drug, and that the lines between love, obsession and madness have become dangerously blurred. Guest starring Douglas Henshall (Primeval), Lucy Liemann (Rev) and Thomas Brodie Sangster (Love Actually)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Ever since a beautiful American woman arrived in the peaceful village of Wychwood-under-Ashe, people have begun to die in a series of apparent accidents. Nobody suspects a killer is at work but, as the body count rises, Miss Marple digs a little deeper with the help of a former policeman - and they gradually unearth a secret that will rock the village to its core. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, Benedict Cumberbatch, David Haig, Sylvia Syms, Margo Stilley and Hugo Speer

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When the remains of a teenager are found half-buried in a wood, Vera finds herself investigating a 30-year-old mystery. Identified as Carrie Telling, a girl who disappeared during the 1984 miners' strike, the team retrieves news footage from the protests that shows her taking pictures in the background. It appears she got caught up in the unrest that day, contradicting her father's assertion that she went straight home. Photographs recovered from her camera yield further revelations for Vera. What did Carrie discover that ultimately led to her death?

programme.title: Quiz
programme.desc: Major Charles Ingram doesn't like quizzes, but for his wife Diana and brother-in-law Adrian knowing the answer is a way of life. As Diana and Adrian's repeated attempts to get into the hotseat on Who Wants to Be a Millionare? fall short, all eyes turn to an unsuspecting Charles to win the million-pound prize. Meanwhile, the repeated reappearance of middle-class, professional quizzers has not gone unnoticed by the ITV team and producer Paul Smith makes a vow to stop them by any means necessary. Fact-based drama directed by Stephen Frears, starring Matthew Macfadyen, Sian Clifford and Mark Bonnar, with Michael Sheen as Chris Tarrant

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth has retired to a charming English village in the hope of finding peace and quiet. However, the murder of a rich industrialist neighbour forces him to leave his new lifestyle behind as he plunges into a sordid world of blackmail and envy, aided by the dogged Chief Inspector Japp. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, Philip Jackson, Malcolm Terris and Oliver Ford Davies

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Part one of two. The badly burned body of a disabled man turns up in a remote part of Manchester and a few days later another corpse is discovered. The detectives start to realise the victims were not just murdered, but tortured too. They make an arrest, but it becomes clear their investigation has just scratched the surface. Meanwhile, Janet throws her husband out and Rachel's estranged brother turns up on her doorstep. With Lisa Riley and Pippa Haywood

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Part two of two. Despite arresting four people, the detectives face a wall of silence in their investigation into the grisly murders - but they eventually make a breakthrough, which doesn't quite give them the answers they were expecting. On the domestic front, Rachel wakes up in bed with charismatic colleague Sean - a mistake she is keen never to repeat - and Janet wants to keep her newly single status a secret

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A confrontation between hunt stewards and saboteurs leads to the suspicious death of a protester - and makes Jack wonder whether the thrill of the chase has given the horsey set a taste for human blood. Whodunit, starring David Jason as DI Frost, with Bruce Alexander, Sean Pertwee, Del Henney and Tat Whalley

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: A death in the family causes problems for Sid. Comedy, starring Diana Coupland

programme.desc: Sid and Jean become worried about their lovesick son, and invite the object of his affections to tea

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger gets a frosty response when he introduces new team member Clive to the others, while Kev and Mag present Mim with a motorised lawn-mower. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Holiday on the Buses (1973)
programme.desc: Bus driver Stan and conductor Jack are fired and wind up working at a holiday camp in Wales, where they fall foul of the security officer - none other than their old adversary Inspector Blake, who has also lost his job and been forced into alternative employment. Comedy based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant, Stephen Lewis, Anna Karen and Doris Hare

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When armed robbers hold up the night mail train, Joe is forced to work with old adversary DI Ludlow (David Calder) to catch the perpetrators. However, Ludlow's unwillingness to include the local police in the investigation leads Joe to believe he may be hiding something. Elsewhere, Peggy is excited to learn she has been left a legacy by a relation of her late husband. Eric Sykes makes a guest appearance

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly starts work at the vets, Tara plans Kim's hen night, while Steve asks Alan to host his stag party at the Woolpack. Chris and Zoe get a shock when they visit Steve's office

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe and Chris try to work out why Steve is conning Kim. Paddy's attitude towards Kelly causes Zoe concern. Kim tells Steve that she has never been happier

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve offers his services to Mike. Judy and Gary await the results of their fertility tests. The Duckworths receive a shock from the VAT man. Fred invites Maureen to the ballet

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Duckworths fear they will be made bankrupt. Steve tries to find work with his old contacts. Kevin is annoyed when Bill asks him if he is having an affair with Natalie

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate the murder of a businesswoman connected with an organisation that supports gifted children, who had apparently been blackmailing the father of one particularly promising youngster. Further deaths follow, and as the body count rises, they realise there is a decades-old secret at the heart of the case. Matters are complicated still further by the presence in Oxford of former MI5 spymaster Grace Orde, who is visiting to sign copies of her tell-all memoir - which provides a vital clue to the killer's identity. Detective drama, guest starring Anna Chancellor and Cherie Lunghi, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The glamorous Ruth Van Rydock contacts her old friend Jane Marple with a mystery - her sister Carrie Louise's study has been devastated by a suspicious fire. While Carrie Louise has the same cheerful outlook as ever, Ruth fears dark forces are at play at Stonygates, the home Carrie shares with her third husband, various relatives and a motley crew of young criminals, the latest subject of Carrie's philanthropic endeavours. But on the evening before a theatrical show is staged for their guests, one of whom is Miss Marple, an even more fascinating performance takes place before their very eyes - one where the final act is murder. Julia McKenzie stars, with guest appearances from Joan Collins, Penelope Wilton, Brian Cox, Maxine Peake, Alexei Sayle, Sarah Smart, Ian Ogilvy, Sean Hughes and Nigel Terry

programme.title: Torvill & Dean
programme.desc: One-off drama following Jayne Torvill and Christopher Dean's humble beginnings and family life in Nottingham, and how they came together to forge an ice-dancing partnership that would see them secure their place in sporting history with 12 perfect 6.0s at the 1984 Winter Olympics for their famous Bolero routine. Will Tudor and Poppy Lee Friar star as the duo, with Stephen Tompkinson, Anita Dobson, Dean Andrews, Jaime Winstone, Christine Bottomley, Annabelle Apsion and Jo Hartley

programme.title: Quiz
programme.desc: Charles returns for a second night in the hot seat with a new strategy. After his previously hopeless performance, he proves massively successful, his dithering answers invariably turning out to be right. However, the production team find his sudden change of fortunes suspicious, and begin looking into an unusual pattern of coughing from the studio audience

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An American businessman fears his life is in danger while travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris, and offers fellow passenger Poirot $10,000 for protection. After rejecting the proposal, the sleuth wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow in Serbia. Racing against time to find the killer among the passengers, Poirot must look to the past to solve the crime, and is faced with a decision that will haunt him for ever. David Suchet takes the title role in the murder mystery, with guest stars Hugh Bonneville, David Morrissey and Eileen Atkins

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: It's Murray and Bailey this week, as Rachel travels to Bristol with the DCI, who is advising on a rape and murder case that bears similarities to one she worked on 13 years previously involving the deaths of four women. Back at home, meanwhile, the detective discovers her brother Dom has been prostituting himself in her flat - and also learns the charges against her ex-boyfriend Nick are being dropped

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The duo look into the murder of an eight-year-old boy, coming up against a paedophile who cruelly deceives his victim's family. Dom's HIV test comes back negative, so he sets out to celebrate - only to endanger his own life and jeopardise Rachel's sergeant's exam in the process. Janet tells Andy she is having second thoughts about their brief liaison, but he finds her decision hard to accept. Suranne Jones and Lesley Sharp star, with Liam Boyle, Nicholas Gleaves and Joe Duttine

programme.title: On the Buses (1971)
programme.desc: Wily bus driver Stan Butler thinks a new company policy that allows women behind the wheel will rob him of his precious overtime money. Enlisting the aid of conductor Jack, he does everything he can to sabotage the plan. Comedy, based on the TV series, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant, Stephen Lewis, Doris Hare, Peter Madden and Anna Karen

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger joins forces with Mim to tackle a double challenge - the threat of a game being called off due to rain, and a challenge to his leadership from another member of the team. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean and Sid are faced with a dilemma when they notice strange goings-on next door. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.desc: Sid's cousin visits the Abbott household, and the bemused family have a terrible time getting rid of him. Sid James stars

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean encounters an old flame, prompting a jealous Sid to remember why he married her in the first place. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sally considers a job which will take her away from the family home. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Rog gets busy organising the team's first match, while Mim tries to cheer up Bob after Ginnie gives him his marching orders. Maggie's sister inadvertently lets slip a secret - with devastating consequences. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: Mutiny on the Buses (1972)
programme.desc: Chirpy bus driver Stan Butler lands himself in trouble as he struggles to raise enough money to marry his girlfriend, and on top of training his unemployed brother-in-law for a job at the depot he has to contend with an officious new manager. Comedy based on the sitcom, starring Reg Varney, Stephen Lewis, Bob Grant, Michael Robbins, Anna Karen and Doris Hare

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A trio of Australian sheep-shearers arrive in Aidensfield to help out at Grimedale Farm, but a missing watch puts one of them behind bars. Rosie is surprised by a face from the past and has to choose between two tempting offers for the future. Elsewhere, Peggy plans to start a laundry business, but leaves David doing all the work, and Phil and Gina make a life-changing decision. Former Neighbours actors Blair McDonough and Martin Crewes guest star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve starts to panic about his business, and the lads attempt to drag him off on his stag night. Tara assures Viv she has planned something memorable for Kim's hen night

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve is confident that he has saved his business and prepares for the wedding. Butch steals a horse from Home Farm. Sal finds out what Steve has done

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Natalie worries that when Sally returns Kevin will drop her. Ken discovers his redundancy money is not as much as he expected. Jack desperately tries to borrow some money

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective investigates after a botanist accidentally unearths the body of a recently buried professor who was fixated upon solving a seemingly impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll. The victim had a long-standing rivalry with his brother - giving Lewis and Hathaway an obvious suspect - but the case is hindered by the mind games of two students who seem intent on causing trouble in their quest to gain admittance to a mysterious club. Guest starring Celia Imrie and James Fleet, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When a body is dredged up from a slurry pit on a remote farm, the investigation forces owner Danny Pryor to admit he has a number of illegal Serbian workers on the payroll. A faded tattoo identifies the victim as Jack Reeves, a young man from the local travelling community, but what is his connection to the immigrants? As the case unfolds, Vera and her team must connect the dots between Jack and a wounded Serbian, and expose the tragic truth at the heart of Pryor Farm. With Mark Bonnar, Mark Womack and Jim Sturgeon

programme.title: Quiz
programme.desc: Persecuted and hounded by the public and press, Charles, Diana and Tecwen head to court. At first it seems the case for the prosecution is solid, but as the case for the defence gets underway, the jury learn there is far more to the story than they first thought. Drama, starring Matthew Macfadyen and Sian Clifford

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective is ordered to take a holiday for the benefit of his health, and with Hastings and Miss Lemon in tow, reluctantly heads for the tranquillity of Devon's coast, where his relaxation is soon ruined by the discovery of a socialite's murdered body on the beach. Several people had reason for wishing Arlena Stuart dead, but high on the list of suspects are her husband, teenage son and a troubled vicar. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser, Philip Jackson and Pauline Moran star

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Janet comes face to face with the man who left her fighting for life just months earlier - serial killer Geoff Hastings, who has vowed to finally reveal the full extent of his crimes. Rachel and the rest of the team investigate the racially motivated murder of a taxi driver. On the personal front, Andy refuses to take no for an answer, so Janet threatens to report him to the DCI. Crime drama, starring Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones, with an appearance by Kevin Doyle (Downton Abbey's Molesley)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel meets Sean's son, who turns out to be an eight-year-old version of his dad, and the idea of becoming a stepmum puts her further off the idea of marriage than she was before - not that she even agreed in the first place. Andy asks Janet out for a drink, but when she turns him down he accuses her of leading him on. A woman in a sexy cop's uniform turns up dead, and the DCI assumes the killer was her lover - the question is, which one of her many lovers was it? And to add to the mystery, why was her face painted green?

programme.title: Holiday on the Buses (1973)
programme.desc: Bus driver Stan and conductor Jack are fired and wind up working at a holiday camp in Wales, where they fall foul of the security officer - none other than their old adversary Inspector Blake, who has also lost his job and been forced into alternative employment. Comedy based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant, Stephen Lewis, Anna Karen and Doris Hare

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger's captaincy hangs in the balance as the votes are cast at the EGM, but Shirley provides an unexpected diversion. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.desc: When his boss goes on holiday, Sid assumes responsibility for guarding his property - but has trouble enforcing his regime. Comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.desc: Maureen is alarmed when Fred keeps calling her. Deirdre is thrilled when Jon asks her out. Kevin is stunned when Natalie tells him she loves him

programme.desc: Zak takes advantage of Marlon being in charge at the wine bar. The Cairns family load up the car ready to leave for Germany. Alan tries to talk Eric out of his depression

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy is furious about the mess the Dingles have caused at the tearooms. Steve is relieved when Kim agrees to sign his contract. Scott tells Lyn he's not happy in the army

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A gang of bikers wreaks havoc in Aidensfield, prompting the locals to demand a new bobby. When young recruit PC Joe Mason (Joe McFadden) arrives he is not quite what they expected, with his tactics for crime fighting making his reception a mixed one between both residents and fellow police officers

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid takes a little exercise and Trevor decides to join him. Seventies sitcom, starring Sid James and Anthony Jackson

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Mike takes up photography, and persuades Sid to let him use the old garage for his new hobby. Family comedy, starring Sid James, Diana Coupland and Robin Stewart

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: As Brent Park Cricket Club prepare for the opening ceremony of their new pitch and pavilion, Mim arranges a big surprise for Rog - but disaster is waiting in the wings. Comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: On the Buses (1971)
programme.desc: Wily bus driver Stan Butler thinks a new company policy that allows women behind the wheel will rob him of his precious overtime money. Enlisting the aid of conductor Jack, he does everything he can to sabotage the plan. Comedy, based on the TV series, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant, Stephen Lewis, Doris Hare, Peter Madden and Anna Karen

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A teenager arrives in the village asking for directions to Ashfordly Hall - and claims to be looking for her father. David decides to make a will, but becomes paranoid when one of the beneficiaries seems too eager to inherit, and a series of accidents befall him. Elsewhere, a new arrival at the Fossett farm is named after Joe. Guest starring Ophelia Lovibond

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jan receives the injunction from Kim's solicitors. Zak embarks on another money-making scheme. Marlon is approached by the police for serving alcohol to under-age children

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe refuses to be bullied by Kim and Steve into giving Kelly a job. Emma insists that she does not want to go back to Germany. Tara confronts Steve about his dad

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin and Natalie plan to spend the night together. The McDonalds go to pick up Steve when he is released from prison. Alma tells Curly she still wants to work at Firman's

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike is annoyed to find out Angie has employed Ida and Janice. Jim is sad that Steve does not want to work with him, and he plans to win Fiona back

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis struggle to determine whether a death during a college-based clinical trial for a new antidepressant was murder or suicide, and receive little assistance from the institution's evasive psychiatric professor. A second student's demise then leads to the revelation that the trial's participants are all operating under the influence of a mind-altering drug, and that the lines between love, obsession and madness have become dangerously blurred. Guest starring Douglas Henshall (Primeval), Lucy Liemann (Rev) and Thomas Brodie Sangster (Love Actually)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Ever since a beautiful American woman arrived in the peaceful village of Wychwood-under-Ashe, people have begun to die in a series of apparent accidents. Nobody suspects a killer is at work but, as the body count rises, Miss Marple digs a little deeper with the help of a former policeman - and they gradually unearth a secret that will rock the village to its core. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, Benedict Cumberbatch, David Haig, Sylvia Syms, Margo Stilley and Hugo Speer

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When the remains of a teenager are found half-buried in a wood, Vera finds herself investigating a 30-year-old mystery. Identified as Carrie Telling, a girl who disappeared during the 1984 miners' strike, the team retrieves news footage from the protests that shows her taking pictures in the background. It appears she got caught up in the unrest that day, contradicting her father's assertion that she went straight home. Photographs recovered from her camera yield further revelations for Vera. What did Carrie discover that ultimately led to her death?

programme.title: Quiz
programme.desc: Major Charles Ingram doesn't like quizzes, but for his wife Diana and brother-in-law Adrian knowing the answer is a way of life. As Diana and Adrian's repeated attempts to get into the hotseat on Who Wants to Be a Millionare? fall short, all eyes turn to an unsuspecting Charles to win the million-pound prize. Meanwhile, the repeated reappearance of middle-class, professional quizzers has not gone unnoticed by the ITV team and producer Paul Smith makes a vow to stop them by any means necessary. Fact-based drama directed by Stephen Frears, starring Matthew Macfadyen, Sian Clifford and Mark Bonnar, with Michael Sheen as Chris Tarrant

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth has retired to a charming English village in the hope of finding peace and quiet. However, the murder of a rich industrialist neighbour forces him to leave his new lifestyle behind as he plunges into a sordid world of blackmail and envy, aided by the dogged Chief Inspector Japp. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, Philip Jackson, Malcolm Terris and Oliver Ford Davies

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Part one of two. The badly burned body of a disabled man turns up in a remote part of Manchester and a few days later another corpse is discovered. The detectives start to realise the victims were not just murdered, but tortured too. They make an arrest, but it becomes clear their investigation has just scratched the surface. Meanwhile, Janet throws her husband out and Rachel's estranged brother turns up on her doorstep. With Lisa Riley and Pippa Haywood

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Part two of two. Despite arresting four people, the detectives face a wall of silence in their investigation into the grisly murders - but they eventually make a breakthrough, which doesn't quite give them the answers they were expecting. On the domestic front, Rachel wakes up in bed with charismatic colleague Sean - a mistake she is keen never to repeat - and Janet wants to keep her newly single status a secret

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A confrontation between hunt stewards and saboteurs leads to the suspicious death of a protester - and makes Jack wonder whether the thrill of the chase has given the horsey set a taste for human blood. Whodunit, starring David Jason as DI Frost, with Bruce Alexander, Sean Pertwee, Del Henney and Tat Whalley

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A confrontation between hunt stewards and saboteurs leads to the suspicious death of a protester - and makes Jack wonder whether the thrill of the chase has given the horsey set a taste for human blood. Whodunit, starring David Jason as DI Frost, with Bruce Alexander, Sean Pertwee, Del Henney and Tat Whalley

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: A death in the family causes problems for Sid. Comedy, starring Diana Coupland

programme.desc: A wartime memento prompts Sid and Jean to visit Paris. Comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: A wartime memento prompts Sid and Jean to visit Paris. Comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger gets a frosty response when he introduces new team member Clive to the others, while Kev and Mag present Mim with a motorised lawn-mower. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Holiday on the Buses (1973)
programme.desc: Bus driver Stan and conductor Jack are fired and wind up working at a holiday camp in Wales, where they fall foul of the security officer - none other than their old adversary Inspector Blake, who has also lost his job and been forced into alternative employment. Comedy based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant, Stephen Lewis, Anna Karen and Doris Hare

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When armed robbers hold up the night mail train, Joe is forced to work with old adversary DI Ludlow (David Calder) to catch the perpetrators. However, Ludlow's unwillingness to include the local police in the investigation leads Joe to believe he may be hiding something. Elsewhere, Peggy is excited to learn she has been left a legacy by a relation of her late husband. Eric Sykes makes a guest appearance

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly starts work at the vets, Tara plans Kim's hen night, while Steve asks Alan to host his stag party at the Woolpack. Chris and Zoe get a shock when they visit Steve's office

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe and Chris try to work out why Steve is conning Kim. Paddy's attitude towards Kelly causes Zoe concern. Kim tells Steve that she has never been happier

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve offers his services to Mike. Judy and Gary await the results of their fertility tests. The Duckworths receive a shock from the VAT man. Fred invites Maureen to the ballet

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Duckworths fear they will be made bankrupt. Steve tries to find work with his old contacts. Kevin is annoyed when Bill asks him if he is having an affair with Natalie

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate the murder of a businesswoman connected with an organisation that supports gifted children, who had apparently been blackmailing the father of one particularly promising youngster. Further deaths follow, and as the body count rises, they realise there is a decades-old secret at the heart of the case. Matters are complicated still further by the presence in Oxford of former MI5 spymaster Grace Orde, who is visiting to sign copies of her tell-all memoir - which provides a vital clue to the killer's identity. Detective drama, guest starring Anna Chancellor and Cherie Lunghi, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The glamorous Ruth Van Rydock contacts her old friend Jane Marple with a mystery - her sister Carrie Louise's study has been devastated by a suspicious fire. While Carrie Louise has the same cheerful outlook as ever, Ruth fears dark forces are at play at Stonygates, the home Carrie shares with her third husband, various relatives and a motley crew of young criminals, the latest subject of Carrie's philanthropic endeavours. But on the evening before a theatrical show is staged for their guests, one of whom is Miss Marple, an even more fascinating performance takes place before their very eyes - one where the final act is murder. Julia McKenzie stars, with guest appearances from Joan Collins, Penelope Wilton, Brian Cox, Maxine Peake, Alexei Sayle, Sarah Smart, Ian Ogilvy, Sean Hughes and Nigel Terry

programme.title: Torvill & Dean
programme.desc: One-off drama following Jayne Torvill and Christopher Dean's humble beginnings and family life in Nottingham, and how they came together to forge an ice-dancing partnership that would see them secure their place in sporting history with 12 perfect 6.0s at the 1984 Winter Olympics for their famous Bolero routine. Will Tudor and Poppy Lee Friar star as the duo, with Stephen Tompkinson, Anita Dobson, Dean Andrews, Jaime Winstone, Christine Bottomley, Annabelle Apsion and Jo Hartley

programme.title: Quiz
programme.desc: Charles returns for a second night in the hot seat with a new strategy. After his previously hopeless performance, he proves massively successful, his dithering answers invariably turning out to be right. However, the production team find his sudden change of fortunes suspicious, and begin looking into an unusual pattern of coughing from the studio audience

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An American businessman fears his life is in danger while travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris, and offers fellow passenger Poirot $10,000 for protection. After rejecting the proposal, the sleuth wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow in Serbia. Racing against time to find the killer among the passengers, Poirot must look to the past to solve the crime, and is faced with a decision that will haunt him for ever. David Suchet takes the title role in the murder mystery, with guest stars Hugh Bonneville, David Morrissey and Eileen Atkins

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: It's Murray and Bailey this week, as Rachel travels to Bristol with the DCI, who is advising on a rape and murder case that bears similarities to one she worked on 13 years previously involving the deaths of four women. Back at home, meanwhile, the detective discovers her brother Dom has been prostituting himself in her flat - and also learns the charges against her ex-boyfriend Nick are being dropped

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The duo look into the murder of an eight-year-old boy, coming up against a paedophile who cruelly deceives his victim's family. Dom's HIV test comes back negative, so he sets out to celebrate - only to endanger his own life and jeopardise Rachel's sergeant's exam in the process. Janet tells Andy she is having second thoughts about their brief liaison, but he finds her decision hard to accept. Suranne Jones and Lesley Sharp star, with Liam Boyle, Nicholas Gleaves and Joe Duttine

programme.title: On the Buses (1971)
programme.desc: Wily bus driver Stan Butler thinks a new company policy that allows women behind the wheel will rob him of his precious overtime money. Enlisting the aid of conductor Jack, he does everything he can to sabotage the plan. Comedy, based on the TV series, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant, Stephen Lewis, Doris Hare, Peter Madden and Anna Karen

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger joins forces with Mim to tackle a double challenge - the threat of a game being called off due to rain, and a challenge to his leadership from another member of the team. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean and Sid are faced with a dilemma when they notice strange goings-on next door. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid's cousin visits the Abbott household, and the bemused family have a terrible time getting rid of him. Sid James stars

programme.desc: Steve offers his services to Mike. Judy and Gary await the results of their fertility tests. The Duckworths receive a shock from the VAT man. Fred invites Maureen to the ballet

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean encounters an old flame, prompting a jealous Sid to remember why he married her in the first place. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sally considers a job which will take her away from the family home. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Rog gets busy organising the team's first match, while Mim tries to cheer up Bob after Ginnie gives him his marching orders. Maggie's sister inadvertently lets slip a secret - with devastating consequences. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: Mutiny on the Buses (1972)
programme.desc: Chirpy bus driver Stan Butler lands himself in trouble as he struggles to raise enough money to marry his girlfriend, and on top of training his unemployed brother-in-law for a job at the depot he has to contend with an officious new manager. Comedy based on the sitcom, starring Reg Varney, Stephen Lewis, Bob Grant, Michael Robbins, Anna Karen and Doris Hare

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A trio of Australian sheep-shearers arrive in Aidensfield to help out at Grimedale Farm, but a missing watch puts one of them behind bars. Rosie is surprised by a face from the past and has to choose between two tempting offers for the future. Elsewhere, Peggy plans to start a laundry business, but leaves David doing all the work, and Phil and Gina make a life-changing decision. Former Neighbours actors Blair McDonough and Martin Crewes guest star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve starts to panic about his business, and the lads attempt to drag him off on his stag night. Tara assures Viv she has planned something memorable for Kim's hen night

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve is confident that he has saved his business and prepares for the wedding. Butch steals a horse from Home Farm. Sal finds out what Steve has done

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Natalie worries that when Sally returns Kevin will drop her. Ken discovers his redundancy money is not as much as he expected. Jack desperately tries to borrow some money

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective investigates after a botanist accidentally unearths the body of a recently buried professor who was fixated upon solving a seemingly impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll. The victim had a long-standing rivalry with his brother - giving Lewis and Hathaway an obvious suspect - but the case is hindered by the mind games of two students who seem intent on causing trouble in their quest to gain admittance to a mysterious club. Guest starring Celia Imrie and James Fleet, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When a body is dredged up from a slurry pit on a remote farm, the investigation forces owner Danny Pryor to admit he has a number of illegal Serbian workers on the payroll. A faded tattoo identifies the victim as Jack Reeves, a young man from the local travelling community, but what is his connection to the immigrants? As the case unfolds, Vera and her team must connect the dots between Jack and a wounded Serbian, and expose the tragic truth at the heart of Pryor Farm. With Mark Bonnar, Mark Womack and Jim Sturgeon

programme.title: Quiz
programme.desc: Persecuted and hounded by the public and press, Charles, Diana and Tecwen head to court. At first it seems the case for the prosecution is solid, but as the case for the defence gets underway, the jury learn there is far more to the story than they first thought. Drama, starring Matthew Macfadyen and Sian Clifford

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective is ordered to take a holiday for the benefit of his health, and with Hastings and Miss Lemon in tow, reluctantly heads for the tranquillity of Devon's coast, where his relaxation is soon ruined by the discovery of a socialite's murdered body on the beach. Several people had reason for wishing Arlena Stuart dead, but high on the list of suspects are her husband, teenage son and a troubled vicar. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser, Philip Jackson and Pauline Moran star

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Janet comes face to face with the man who left her fighting for life just months earlier - serial killer Geoff Hastings, who has vowed to finally reveal the full extent of his crimes. Rachel and the rest of the team investigate the racially motivated murder of a taxi driver. On the personal front, Andy refuses to take no for an answer, so Janet threatens to report him to the DCI. Crime drama, starring Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones, with an appearance by Kevin Doyle (Downton Abbey's Molesley)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel meets Sean's son, who turns out to be an eight-year-old version of his dad, and the idea of becoming a stepmum puts her further off the idea of marriage than she was before - not that she even agreed in the first place. Andy asks Janet out for a drink, but when she turns him down he accuses her of leading him on. A woman in a sexy cop's uniform turns up dead, and the DCI assumes the killer was her lover - the question is, which one of her many lovers was it? And to add to the mystery, why was her face painted green?

programme.title: Holiday on the Buses (1973)
programme.desc: Bus driver Stan and conductor Jack are fired and wind up working at a holiday camp in Wales, where they fall foul of the security officer - none other than their old adversary Inspector Blake, who has also lost his job and been forced into alternative employment. Comedy based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant, Stephen Lewis, Anna Karen and Doris Hare

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger's captaincy hangs in the balance as the votes are cast at the EGM, but Shirley provides an unexpected diversion. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: The boys are dismissed from hospital and promptly arrange a reunion under more enjoyable circumstances

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar plays his part in a gangster's plot to trick his four greatest enemies into carrying out a robbery. Stephanie Beacham features in an early role, alongside Roger Moore

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The prime minister asks Holmes to investigate the disappearance of a letter which could lead to a major European catastrophe. Unfortunately, completion of the task requires him to jeopardise a titled lady's reputation - something he is naturally reluctant to do. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo investigate the killings of a drug dealer and an SI-10 officer and are soon on the trail of an assassin hired by a powerful American crimelord. Drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry gets a job chauffeuring the villainous Micky the Fish, but fears for his life when the gangster's mistress reports her jewels missing. Light-hearted crime caper, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are asked to keep a surveillance on Cowley after evidence suggests he has stolen two canisters of a lethal nerve gas and begun negotiating with an unfriendly foreign power. The plot thickens when they trace their boss to a country mansion, where after they are caught he denies knowing them

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The son of an ex-informant is kidnapped and the Flying Squad is brought in to assist in the hunt. Against Regan's advice his father, a wealthy businessman, pays the ransom and the boy is returned. However, the reunion quickly turns sour. Joss Ackland guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates when a trusted diplomat friend goes missing with $1million, while his daughter is adducted. Robert Hardy guest stars, with Roger Moore

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman asks Holmes to search for her missing husband, a businessman who was last seen peering from the window of an opium den in London's notorious Limehouse area. Suspicion falls on a well-known local beggar - but his innocence is eventually proved in bizarre fashion. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo probe a colleague's death, which brings to light the officer's investigations into the activities of right-wing extremists

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's latest money-making idea involves a racing scam with an imaginary office. He hires a postal address and uses three public telephone boxes, and Terry has to make sure they are kept free. Drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 is faced with a terrifying campaign of explosions and assassinations, apparently committed by an opposing operative that Cowley is convinced he killed several years earlier. It appears that he is either mistaken or an old associate of his former adversary is seeking revenge. Gordon Jackson stars

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: On Ullswater in the Lake District, the Patterdale Mountain Rescue team is called to assist a man who has broken his leg on the far shore of the lake, the second longest in the UK. Thankfully, the team has a high-speed boat in which to rush to his aid. In the Gap of Dunloe County in Kerry, a 22-year-old climber has fallen 75ft and hit a boulder. He has regained consciousness but has broken several bones and his pelvis. The Kerry Mountain Rescue Team, National Ambulance service and Irish Coast Guard helicopter winch him 200ft on a stretcher to the hovering helicopter

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: On Croagh Patrick in Co Mayo, the Mayo Mountain Rescue Team gears up for the annual religious pilgrimage, where up to 30,000 people set out to reach the summit of the mountain. More than 120 volunteers from other rescue teams, the Order of Malta, Civil Defence and Irish Air Corps assist the many injured pilgrims as they fall, have heart attacks and break ankles. On the Kinder Plateau, the Buxton and Kinder Mountain Rescue teams are called to an injured walker, while in the Lake District, three mountain rescue teams attend an injured ice climber with spinal and head injuries

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look at a Welsh factory creating tinsel, a team hand-rolling festive crackers, how Christmas puddings are made to last and how advent calendars are created

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: Riding an historic Tiger Moth bi-plane, Griff Rhys Jones arrives in the humid tropics of Darwin. He encounters a crocodile and an iconic news editor, before travelling through the night on a road train, arriving in the 'red centre' of Alice Springs - only to be surprised by the lush green sporting fields and the mysterious Americans playing baseball there. The presenter gets some tips on how to survive in the desert from an Aboriginal elder, before riding into the sunset on a camel - in tribute to the Afghan cameleers for which the legendary Ghan passenger train is named

programme.title: The World's End (2013)
programme.desc: A 40-year-old man who refuses to grow up drags four reluctant childhood friends back to their home town to recreate a pub crawl they attempted in their teens. As they work their way round the 12 local bars, they stumble on a threat to the entire human race. Sci-fi comedy, starring Simon Pegg, Nick Frost and Martin Freeman

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: The latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: The World's End (2013)
programme.desc: A 40-year-old man who refuses to grow up drags four reluctant childhood friends back to their home town to recreate a pub crawl they attempted in their teens. As they work their way round the 12 local bars, they stumble on a threat to the entire human race. Sci-fi comedy, starring Simon Pegg, Nick Frost and Martin Freeman

programme.title: Car Crash Global: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Documentary featuring dash-cam video footage of a host of astonishing accidents, spectacular smashes and enthralling escapes from South-East Asia and South Africa

programme.title: Motorsport UK
programme.desc: John Neil presents action from Thruxton, including round 11 of the GT4 Supercup and round 13 of the Mini Challenge Trophy

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A boat belonging to one of Theo's fellow detectives is destroyed in an arson attack, and he sets out to prove that his wife's sleazy divorce lawyer is responsible

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Part one of two. An outbreak of a deadly disease threatens to reach epidemic proportions in a resort hotel, leaving the medical examiner under pressure to locate the source of the mystery bug. Jack Klugman and Robert Ito star

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A man who killed members of his family in their own home pleads not guilty on the grounds of insanity, but Quincy has his suspicions

programme.title: ITV4 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates when a trusted diplomat friend goes missing with $1million, while his daughter is adducted. Robert Hardy guest stars, with Roger Moore

programme.desc: The duo probe a colleague's death, which brings to light the officer's investigations into the activities of right-wing extremists

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Figgis eavesdrops on a conversation between members of the hospital staff, and promptly passes on the gossip to all and sundry. James Bolam stars

programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates when a trusted diplomat friend goes missing with $1million, while his daughter is adducted. Robert Hardy guest stars, with Roger Moore

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman asks Holmes to search for her missing husband, a businessman who was last seen peering from the window of an opium den in London's notorious Limehouse area. Suspicion falls on a well-known local beggar - but his innocence is eventually proved in bizarre fashion. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo probe a colleague's death, which brings to light the officer's investigations into the activities of right-wing extremists

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's latest money-making idea involves a racing scam with an imaginary office. He hires a postal address and uses three public telephone boxes, and Terry has to make sure they are kept free. Drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 is faced with a terrifying campaign of explosions and assassinations, apparently committed by an opposing operative that Cowley is convinced he killed several years earlier. It appears that he is either mistaken or an old associate of his former adversary is seeking revenge. Gordon Jackson stars

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad trails diamond thief Jimmy Fleet on the inside, with Carter acting undercover as a fellow prisoner aiming to gain his confidence. On his release for lack of evidence, Fleet seeks Carter's assistance after discovering his girlfriend has vanished with the jewels, suspecting she has been abducted. Michael Elphick guest stars

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar has to undergo training to become a mercenary in an attempt to foil a hijacking. Roger Moore stars

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An intruder begins breaking into people's homes and destroying their plaster statuettes of Napoleon, but leaving more valuable items untouched. Holmes resolves to find out why, eventually uncovering a twisted tale of theft and murder. Jeremy Brett stars as the master detective

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Dempsey comes up against a man who is his equal in all respects. The only difference is that he's on the wrong side of the law. Obsessed with capturing him, Dempsey tests Makepeace's patience to the limit. Will Dempsey succeed against impossible odds?

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Members of the local travelling community are blamed when a car-dealer friend of Arthur's has the frighteners put on him. However, they soon prove useful allies when those actually responsible are revealed. Comedy drama, guest starring Jimmy Nail and June Whitfield

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are pitted against KGB assassins when a CI5 operative is apparently raised from the dead. A proposed exchange finds Cowley at a deserted aerodrome, and a burst of gunfire apparently leaves his life on the line. Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson star

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: Ireland's national champion surfer Gearoid McDaid takes a serious fall in the surf and badly injures his leg, so members of the Irish Tow Surf Rescue Club are asked to pick him up and lead him to safety. The Kinder Mountain Rescue Team is called to a mountain biker who's fallen over the handlebars and torn an artery. His life is in the balance and it is only the quick thinking of a passer-by and the prompt arrival of the rescue team and air ambulance that ensures his survival

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: In the Cairngorm mountains in Scotland, handlers and their search and rescue dogs undergo final training in the snowy peaks. Every search and rescue dog will train for up to two years before it is deemed ready to act within mountain rescue teams looking for lost and injured walkers. In the Galtee Mountains of Tipperary, Search and Rescue dog Ziggy is searching for an injured walker somewhere near Galtee mountain, while in the Peak District the Kinder Mountain Rescue Team attends a walker in severe pain with a broken ankle

programme.title: On the Road
programme.desc: The motoring show begins with the ultimate fast Ford being explored on road and track. The show also hits the beach in two luxurious SUVs and heads to Lamborginhi country with racing driver Vicky Piria. Plus, a look at the world's best-selling electric vehicle and an exploration ofItaly in a Ferrari and an Aston Martin

programme.title: evo Car of The Year
programme.desc: A team of eight journalists test 16 motors to decide which one is evo Car of the Year. In the opening part, the contenders are put through their paces at Anglesey Circuit in Wales, with eight of them making the cut for the final test in Scotland

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts a festive edition with actors Steve Pemberton, Paula Lane and Ben Miller, and Educating Yorkshire's Mr Burton. The contestants compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by taking on one of the show's resident trivia experts in a test of general knowledge, but they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street (2013)
programme.desc: A New York stockbroker rises from unemployment to become one of the richest men in the city's financial elite through an illegal scheme to defraud investors. His wealth brings him an outrageously debauched lifestyle, but comes at a price as the FBI become suspicious of his manipulation of the markets. Martin Scorsese's fact-based drama, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Jonah Hill and Matthew McConaughey

With John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar helps a businessman who claims he is being ruined by an imposter. Classic adventures, starring Roger Moore

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Part one. Dempsey goes undercover as a small-time crook to snare an underhanded police commissioner

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: A walker on Croagh Patrick Mountain sustains a serious head injury and members of the Mayo Mountain Rescue Team carry him down the mountainside to the Irish Coast Guard helicopter. Cairngorm Mountain Rescue Team are called to a climber who has fallen several feet on a rocky outcrop known as Lurchers Crag, while a world-class surfer at Mullaghmore sustains a severe leg injury

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: In the north of England severe flooding, the worst in 70 years, brings chaos to the region. Standard emergency services are overwhelmed, and numerous volunteer rescue teams are brought in to assist in evacuating members of the public from their flooded homes. In Co Kerry, the local mountain rescue team is called to Torc Mountain and a steep path known as 'cardiac steps' to attend a walker complaining of chest pains. In the Cairngorm mountains, members of the local rescue team comb the third region to find a lost walker who has not returned home after heading out on a trek

programme.title: On the Road
programme.desc: Featuring a test of the ultimate open-top sports cars, Porsche's new electric car, and a taste of movie magic with the Mustang Bullitt. Plus, a trip to the French Riviera to try out the all-new Bentley Flying Spur

programme.title: evo Car of The Year
programme.desc: The final eight cars are put through their paces by motoring journalists in the Scottish Borders, with the leading motor crowned the 2020 evo Car of the Year

programme.title: Battleship (2012)
programme.desc: A reckless slacker joins the Navy, hoping to win the respect of his girlfriend's father, a stern admiral. He and his shipmates are put to the ultimate test as part of a force of vessels that must battle an invading fleet of powerful alien spaceships. Sci-fi adventure, starring Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Alexander Skarsgard

programme.title: Bad Move
programme.desc: As the comedy series returns, the rose-tinted fantasy of an idyllic country lifestyle proves to be further away than ever from Nicky and Steve. Their crumbling wreck of a house continues to throw problems at them, and the pair struggle to find a builder willing to fix the gaping hole in their roof. Starring Jack Dee and Kerry Godliman

programme.title: Bad Move
programme.desc: A contract for Steve's web design business would give the couple a much needed financial lifeline. In an attempt to impress the potential client, Steve foolishly brags about the amazing renovation job that he and Nicky have done to their idyllic country cottage, but the lie comes back to haunt him when the client announces that she wants to come and see their home

programme.title: Billy Connolly's Great American Trail
programme.desc: The comedian embarks on a journey across the US, following the migratory trail of the Scots through America - starting in New York and finishing in Nashville, Tennessee. The first episode sees Billy open the New York Tartan Day parade in front of a 30,000-strong crowd. He then heads to Plymouth, Massachusetts, where the pilgrims first landed on American soil, followed by a meeting with the Native American tribe who almost had their people and language wiped out

programme.title: Take the Tower
programme.desc: Dolph Lundgren challenges team captain Sandeep and his friends Andy, Paul and Dan to a combination of physical challenges and quiz questions inspired by classic action movies

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Harry Rule and the team come to the aid of Freddie Reiwald, a researcher who fears his life is being threatened. Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter star

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: The boys are dismissed from hospital and promptly arrange a reunion under more enjoyable circumstances

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar plays his part in a gangster's plot to trick his four greatest enemies into carrying out a robbery. Stephanie Beacham features in an early role, alongside Roger Moore

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The prime minister asks Holmes to investigate the disappearance of a letter which could lead to a major European catastrophe. Unfortunately, completion of the task requires him to jeopardise a titled lady's reputation - something he is naturally reluctant to do. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo investigate the killings of a drug dealer and an SI-10 officer and are soon on the trail of an assassin hired by a powerful American crimelord. Drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry gets a job chauffeuring the villainous Micky the Fish, but fears for his life when the gangster's mistress reports her jewels missing. Light-hearted crime caper, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are asked to keep a surveillance on Cowley after evidence suggests he has stolen two canisters of a lethal nerve gas and begun negotiating with an unfriendly foreign power. The plot thickens when they trace their boss to a country mansion, where after they are caught he denies knowing them

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The son of an ex-informant is kidnapped and the Flying Squad is brought in to assist in the hunt. Against Regan's advice his father, a wealthy businessman, pays the ransom and the boy is returned. However, the reunion quickly turns sour. Joss Ackland guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates when a trusted diplomat friend goes missing with $1million, while his daughter is adducted. Robert Hardy guest stars, with Roger Moore

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 is faced with a terrifying campaign of explosions and assassinations, apparently committed by an opposing operative that Cowley is convinced he killed several years earlier. programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: On Ullswater in the Lake District, the Patterdale Mountain Rescue team is called to assist a man who has broken his leg on the far shore of the lake, the second longest in the UK. Thankfully, the team has a high-speed boat in which to rush to his aid. In the Gap of Dunloe County in Kerry, a 22-year-old climber has fallen 75ft and hit a boulder. He has regained consciousness but has broken several bones and his pelvis. The Kerry Mountain Rescue Team, National Ambulance service and Irish Coast Guard helicopter winch him 200ft on a stretcher to the hovering helicopter

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: On Croagh Patrick in Co Mayo, the Mayo Mountain Rescue Team gears up for the annual religious pilgrimage, where up to 30,000 people set out to reach the summit of the mountain. More than 120 volunteers from other rescue teams, the Order of Malta, Civil Defence and Irish Air Corps assist the many injured pilgrims as they fall, have heart attacks and break ankles. On the Kinder Plateau, the Buxton and Kinder Mountain Rescue teams are called to an injured walker, while in the Lake District, three mountain rescue teams attend an injured ice climber with spinal and head injuries

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look at a Welsh factory creating tinsel, a team hand-rolling festive crackers, how Christmas puddings are made to last and how advent calendars are created

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: Riding an historic Tiger Moth bi-plane, Griff Rhys Jones arrives in the humid tropics of Darwin. He encounters a crocodile and an iconic news editor, before travelling through the night on a road train, arriving in the 'red centre' of Alice Springs - only to be surprised by the lush green sporting fields and the mysterious Americans playing baseball there. The presenter gets some tips on how to survive in the desert from an Aboriginal elder, before riding into the sunset on a camel - in tribute to the Afghan cameleers for which the legendary Ghan passenger train is named

programme.title: The World's End (2013)
programme.desc: A 40-year-old man who refuses to grow up drags four reluctant childhood friends back to their home town to recreate a pub crawl they attempted in their teens. As they work their way round the 12 local bars, they stumble on a threat to the entire human race. Sci-fi comedy, starring Simon Pegg, Nick Frost and Martin Freeman
